The scene uses a 360-degree spinning camera, slow motion, muffled sound, and motion blur to create an intense sensory overload effect as explosions erupt and people flee.

video:video.video:title: Digital Claustrophobia: The Shining Horror Short
video:video.video:description: A detailed 15-second script prompt for Seedance 2.0, titled 'Digital Claustrophobia,' blending the horror aesthetic of 'The Shining' with digital/AI themes. The prompt specifies scene details (Overlook Hotel corridor), character actions (boy in VR headset), atmosphere (claustrophobic, digital artifacts), sound design (dissonant orchestral music, electronic noise), and a terrifying climax involving AI and digital mutation.

video:video.video:title: 10-Second Spring Festival Gala Talk Show: Zhen Huan and Hu Fei
video:video.video:description: A detailed 10-second script prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video in the style of a Spring Festival Gala skit, featuring characters Zhen Huan and Hu Fei from a historical drama in a modern talk show setting. The prompt specifies scene setup, character costumes (museum-grade Qing Dynasty robes), modern props (Bluetooth headset, tablet), camera work (OTS shots, full stage view), and a high-saturation red/gold festive visual style.

video:video.video:title: 12 Flower Goddesses Quick Transformation Video
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video of 12 Flower Goddesses quickly turning and transforming into different poses and outfits corresponding to 12 types of flowers (Plum, Apricot, Peach, Peony, Pomegranate, Lotus, Hollyhock, Osmanthus, Chrysanthemum, Hibiscus, Camellia, Narcissus). The video should feature stunning special effects, misty atmosphere, push-pull camera movements, and rhythmic transformation cuts.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Transformation Prompt: 10 World Female Armors
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, 12-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video featuring a female subject transforming through 10 different historical and fantasy world armors (Chinese, Japanese, European, Roman, Viking, Persian, Mongolian, Indian, Arabian, Spartan, and Fantasy Queen). The prompt specifies that the subject must wear a full helmet and hold a weapon for each transformation, with glow particle effects during transitions, maintaining a high-level, realistic, and shocking style.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Short Horror Drama Prompt: 'Echo Program'
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second sci-fi horror short drama titled 'Echo Program,' exploring the theme of dependence on AI for coding. The prompt specifies four scenes with detailed visuals, character actions, atmosphere, dialogue, and sound effects, culminating in a terrifying twist.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Transformation Video Prompt: 12 Flower Gods
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-definition, cinematic video featuring a young woman transforming rapidly into the 12 Flower Gods (梅花, 杏花, 桃花, etc.) using quick turns and hand gestures. The prompt specifies 8K resolution, cinematic quality, rich expressions, and a 'card-point' transformation style with push/pull camera movements and special effects.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Beautiful Chef Cooking Sour Fish Soup
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video of a beautiful female chef preparing a dish, specifically sour fish soup, with precise instructions for camera angles, actions, and timing for each 2-3 second segment, including initial fish preparation, slicing, stir-frying, boiling, and final oil pouring.

video:video.video:title: 15-Second Multi-Scene Video Prompt for a Sacred Eastern Realm
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second video depicting a sacred Eastern realm. The prompt specifies cinematic lighting, ultra-clear details, volumetric light, specific materials (glazed, gold particles), and scene progression across four 3-second segments, focusing on a solemn, pure, and peaceful atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Gray Tabby Cat in a Suit Character Description
video:video.video:description: A detailed character description for a Pixar-style 3D rendered video, featuring a gray tabby cat in a navy blue suit standing at a whiteboard, designed to convey intellectual superiority and controlled irritation.

video:video.video:title: Neon Circuit Board Sequence
video:video.video:description: A multi-shot prompt detailing a sequence involving a neon-blue liquid droplet hitting a circuit board, followed by the circuit lines igniting, and finally a robotic arm appearing, complete with specific audio cues for each shot.

video:video.video:title: Mystical Griffin and Boy Encounter
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a video featuring a huge mystical griffin approaching a small, unafraid boy. The scene uses close-ups to emphasize the boy's calm expression and the griffin's intense gaze, suggesting a powerful, emotional encounter.

video:video.video:title: Documentary Style Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt focused on achieving a highly realistic, imperfect, handheld documentary style, emphasizing textures, lighting, and camera artifacts like lens dirt and sensor noise.

video:video.video:title: Stylized 3D Tea Ceremony Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A structured seedance 2.0 video prompt for a multi-cut, 6-beat sequence culminating in a stylized 3D ceremonial payoff, featuring a tea ceremony master rendered with ceramic and ink-washed silk textures.

video:video.video:title: Hyper-Tension Technician Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A structured seedance 2.0 video prompt specifying format, cuts, and a hyper-tension mood. The subject is a perspiring technician in protective gear in a sun-bleached, deserted city intersection.

video:video.video:title: Armored Convoy Desert Action Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a high-action desert scene featuring an armored convoy speeding through dunes, with one vehicle swerving due to a nearby explosion. The camera transitions from a high aerial drone shot to a ground-level tracking shot, emphasizing motion blur and epic scale.

video:video.video:title: Collapsing City Disaster Scene Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a cinematic disaster scene where a lone survivor runs through a collapsing modern city. The prompt specifies the camera movement, transitioning from a high-altitude drone shot to a ground-level tracking shot, emphasizing dynamic lighting and massive debris.

video:video.video:title: Liquid Gold Futuristic City Transformation Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 requesting a 10-second abstract transformation sequence. Liquid gold drops fall onto a surface, forming geometric patterns that rise up and transform into a miniature futuristic city skyline against a pure black background.

video:video.video:title: Rainbow Lorikeet Home Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 requesting a vertical, 15-second, wholesome home-video style clip featuring a vibrant rainbow lorikeet parrot perched on a blanket, with a human hand giving a thumbs-up. The prompt specifies the bird's appearance, lighting, background, and aesthetic constraints like aspect ratio and stylization parameters.

video:video.video:title: Night Deck Recovery Shot List Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A structured prompt for Seedance 2.0 using a shot list format to generate a 15-second night landing thriller sequence on an aircraft carrier deck, specifying lighting, mood, and six distinct shots detailing the fighter jet's approach and recovery.

video:video.video:title: Superbike Touge Run Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a superbike run on a mountain pass (touge), focusing on the camera perspective (handlebar-height), motion blur, lighting (dawn mountain light), and the specific actions of the bike leaning and exiting a corner.

video:video.video:title: Gen Z Commercial Prompt (Metaimage + Seedance 2)
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 (used in conjunction with Metaimage) to generate a fast-paced, high-energy Gen Z style commercial montage featuring an urban lifestyle, quick cuts, dynamic camera movement, and a product highlight (JBL headphones).

video:video.video:title: Photorealistic Street Dance Battle Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 requesting a 15-second photorealistic street dance battle scene at night, specifying the environment (wet pavement, neon, mist), the choreography (solo floor moves followed by synchronized group performance), and camera style (smooth, stable cinematic).

video:video.video:title: Formula 1 Monaco Tunnel Exit Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a violent, instantaneous transition shot of a Formula 1 car exiting a tunnel into bright Mediterranean light, focusing on camera angles, motion, and the Monaco harbor aesthetic.

video:video.video:title: Impossible Cinematic Transition Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on a single, seamless, impossible cinematic transition shot. The scene moves from an aerial chase of a meteor-like projectile to its impact and subsequent transition through a dust cloud into a brutal ground-level infantry clash, before whipping back up for a wide reveal.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Crime Drama Test Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 10-second cinematic crime drama scene. The prompt specifies the visual style, main subjects (mafia boss and two thieves), environment, lighting, camera work, mood, dialogue, and a precise timeline/shot list.

video:video.video:title: Anime-Style Rooftop Fight Scene Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A scene-by-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a fast-paced, anime-style fight video where a woman jumps from a rooftop to confront two armored knights, using claws against swords.

video:video.video:title: Impossible Cavalry Charge Camera Shot Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A complex, continuous camera motion prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an impossible 15-second shot that starts under a thundering cavalry charge, weaves through an infantry collision, and rises above the battlefield for a vast overhead reveal.

video:video.video:title: Flaming Arrow Camera Shot Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A complex, continuous camera motion prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an impossible 15-second shot where the camera is locked behind a single flaming arrow as it flies across a massive battlefield and crashes into a shield.

video:video.video:title: Impossible Naval War Camera Shot Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A complex, continuous camera motion prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an impossible 15-second shot that transitions from underwater to the deck of a warship during a jet landing, ending in the sky.

video:video.video:title: Chaotic Kung-Fu Fight Scene Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a raw, visceral, and chaotic kung-fu fight scene between a woman and a mercenary in a destroyed hotel room, emphasizing 'found-footage' amateur handheld cinematography and gritty textures.

video:video.video:title: Impossible Siege Tower Camera Shot Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A complex, continuous camera motion prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an impossible 15-second shot that races toward and through a collapsing wooden siege tower during a battle.

video:video.video:title: Complex Close Combat Sequence
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a complex, continuous shot of a protagonist engaging in precise, ruthless close combat against multiple thugs in an indoor hall, emphasizing character consistency, weapon visibility, and camera language.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Pianist Scene Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A simple prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic medium shot of a handsome pianist using butterfly lighting, set in a concert hall with audience noise.

video:video.video:title: Shattering and Reforming Smartphone Sequence
video:video.video:description: A two-part prompt sequence for Seedance 2.0, demonstrating text-to-video generation followed by video extension. The first prompt generates a smartphone shattering in slow motion, and the second reverses the process, reforming the phone.

video:video.video:title: Supervolcano City Destruction
video:video.video:description: A dramatic video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing the catastrophic destruction of a modern city by a supervolcano eruption, focusing on lava flows, collapsing buildings, and cinematic lighting.

video:video.video:title: High-Speed Boat Chase in Hong Kong Harbor
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-stage action sequence prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a high-stakes speedboat chase in the neon-lit Hong Kong harbor, including a wave-launch stunt over a cargo ship, a dock landing, and threading through a narrow canal.

video:video.video:title: Apocalyptic Transformation Sequence
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-stage video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a protagonist's painful transformation into an armored state within an apocalyptic wasteland, focusing on cinematic style, camera movement, and specific actions across a 15-second timeline.

video:video.video:title: 10-Second Sci-Fi Comedy Video Prompt: Mechanic vs. Robot
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 Pro generating a 10-second sci-fi comedy animation. The scene features a female spaceship mechanic dealing with a mischievous magnetic repair robot, with precise instructions for character appearance, lighting, camera style, and a five-part performance arc culminating in a chaotic defeat.

video:video.video:title: Impossible Fantasy War Shot Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly descriptive prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a 15-second, continuous, impossible camera move through an epic fantasy war scene, starting with a colossal dragon and diving down into a massive battlefield.

video:video.video:title: 10-Second Cinematic Comedy Video Prompt: Delivery Courier Door Fail
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 Pro designed to generate a 10-second, single-shot, Pixar-inspired, physically believable comedy animation. The scene features a delivery courier repeatedly failing to enter an automatic sliding door, with precise instructions for character appearance, environment, style, camera work, and a five-part performance arc.

video:video.video:title: Dynamic FPV Motocross Chase Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a dynamic, high-energy FPV (First-Person View) shot tracking a motocross rider through a crumbling, abandoned city, culminating in a cinematic jump between rooftops.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Cyberpunk Time Travel from Disaster to Ancient Market
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-act prompt for Seedance 2.0, inspired by Inception, describing a seamless transition (one-shot, hard cut) from a disaster movie setting (cyberpunk heroine in a flooded city) to an ancient Oriental market via a time portal, focusing on extreme cinematic realism, lighting contrast, and complex action sequences. It uses one reference image for the heroine.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Nezha and Minions-like Characters
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 that uses descriptive language to circumvent content restrictions (like mentioning 'Nezha' or 'Minions'). It describes a Chinese mythological boy with specific features (double buns, red mark, red ribbon) searching for and engaging in a comedic chase with yellow capsule-shaped creatures in a Chinatown setting.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Short Drama Prompt: 'The Marriage'
video:video.video:description: A multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a short historical drama video titled 'The Marriage.' It details four scenes, including character actions, emotions, dialogue, camera work (slow motion, cinematic lighting), and requires two reference images for the female lead (Junzhu) and the male lead.

video:video.video:title: Martial Arts Fight Scene in a Japanese Dojo
video:video.video:description: A detailed video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a high-energy martial arts fight scene set in a Japanese-style dojo, featuring a female character fighting multiple opponents with dynamic action, high kicks, and dialogue.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for 'Affordable Transportation' Ad
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a humorous video advertisement about affordable transportation, starting with a luxury car purchase scenario and ending with the reveal of a retro commuter bicycle, emphasizing low fuel consumption ('two steamed buns per 100 kilometers').

video:video.video:title: Long Exposure Video of Contemporary Dancer
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a long exposure video of a contemporary dancer performing in a dark studio, aiming for a motion trail ghosting effect that captures the path of movement, with the dancer sharp at the end of the movement.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Forest Horror Sequence
video:video.video:description: A multi-shot cinematic prompt for generating a tense and unsettling photorealistic horror scene set in a dark, foggy forest at night, focusing on a flashlight beam and sound effects like cracking branches, using only hard cuts.

video:video.video:title: Character Description for a Kung Fu Chef
video:video.video:description: A detailed character description prompt for a 'Lean kung fu chef' with specific physical features and attire, combining martial arts and modernized Chinese chef elements.

video:video.video:title: Documentary Style Video Prompt with Imperfect Camera Effects
video:video.video:description: A prompt designed to generate a video with a highly realistic, documentary-style aesthetic, mimicking an iPhone handheld camera with cold, desaturated tones, natural overcast lighting, and various imperfections like sensor noise, lens dirt, autofocus breathing, and imperfect framing.

video:video.video:title: 3D CG Animation of a Monk Riding a White Horse
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a high-saturation 3D CG animation video in the style of Ne Zha and Monkey King films, featuring a bald Buddhist monk in golden-yellow robes riding a majestic white horse, utilizing strong contrast, volumetric lighting, and cinematic effects.

video:video.video:title: Chubby Golden Shorthair Cat Eating Chinese Food
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a video of a chubby golden British Shorthair cat sitting upright and eating Chinese food with chopsticks from a steaming bowl on a small tray table in a dimly lit bedroom at night.

video:video.video:title: Three-Shot Video Sequence Prompt with Audio Cues
video:video.video:description: A detailed, three-shot video sequence prompt specifying the duration, visual content, and corresponding audio cues for each shot, focusing on a macro shot of butter, a close-up of a baker's reaction, and an accident involving flour.

video:video.video:title: Anime Sakuga Fight Scene Prompt 1
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a 10-second, premium quality, ultra-fluid anime sakuga high-speed fight scene featuring a tough delinquent schoolgirl with specific physical and clothing characteristics.

video:video.video:title: Multi-Phase Visual Prompt (Chinese/English)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-phase prompt for a 0.5s cut video sequence, focusing on rapid background switching while the central subject maintains the same pose. The sequence transitions from a caveman in a cave to a Roman emperor in a marble palace, both biting food.

video:video.video:title: Zootopia Comedic Donut Chase Short
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, scene-by-scene Seedance 2.0 prompt for a 15-second comedic animated short in the style of Zootopia, focusing on Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde chasing and securing a single strawberry jelly donut as evidence, emphasizing visual comedy and precise camera language.

video:video.video:title: Sci-Fi Soldier Transformation VFX
video:video.video:description: A Seedance 2.0 prompt for a cinematic VFX shot on an Arri Alexa Mini LF, depicting a rugged soldier in a desert hangar undergoing a visceral, violent transformation into a militaristic mecha suit via a wrist-mounted trigger.

video:video.video:title: Cybernetic Beetle Macro Chase
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, six-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second photorealistic macro video. The sequence follows a cybernetically enhanced rhinoceros beetle through a jungle floor, emphasizing close-up shots, mechanical details, and a final exponential pull-back to reveal a bioluminescent greenhouse.

video:video.video:title: Absurd Cute Dog Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed seedance 2.0 prompt for a photorealistic cinematic vertical video featuring an extremely plump, spherical dog-like creature in a modern interior, capturing the 'what the dog doing gugugaga' trend.

video:video.video:title: Dark Knight and Armored Taotie Transformation
video:video.video:description: An extremely complex and detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on a realistic sci-fi tokusatsu transformation sequence. It specifies the core theme, character setup (including facial expression and clothing based on a reference image), the design of the Heavily Armored Dark Knight, the evolution of a creature into an Armored Taotie, core props, and a post-apocalyptic environment.

video:video.video:title: Chibi Phoebe Close-up Portrait with Baby-Talk
video:video.video:description: A detailed two-part prompt for Seedance 2.0, first defining a photorealistic vertical portrait of a charming young East Asian woman (Chibi Phoebe) with specific aesthetic and lighting constraints, and second, defining the 15-second motion sequence including subtle head tilts, gentle smiling, and mouth movements synchronized with soft baby-talk gibberish.

video:video.video:title: The Barista Rube Goldberg Machine
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-section prompt for a 15-second video sequence featuring a frantic barista whose café is an interconnected Rube Goldberg machine. The prompt specifies character appearance, environment, mood, and a precise timeline of actions and audible elements, generated using Seedance 2.0.

video:video.video:title: Chibi penguin girl 'Gugu Gaga' cooking with an angry expression
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for a dynamic, vertically oriented chibi anime animation featuring the character 'Gugu Gaga' (Endministrator from Arknights Endfield). The prompt specifies her appearance, clothing, shifting expressions, actions (holding a frying pan over a wok), and perfectly synced dialogue, emphasizing a kawaii moe aesthetic and high-quality animation.

video:video.video:title: Surreal Sky Ocean Battle: Whale vs. Kraken
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second cinematic sequence featuring a colossal sky-whale battling a kraken made of storm clouds in a surreal ocean floating in the sky at sunset. The prompt includes specific choreography, velocity ramping, camera movements, and photorealistic style constraints.

video:video.video:title: Ultra-realistic martial arts choreography between a cat and a master
video:video.video:description: A detailed, time-coded prompt for an ultra-realistic video testing martial arts choreography, fur physics, and comedic timing, featuring a British Shorthair cat and a Kung Fu master in a rapid exchange, ending with the cat walking away triumphantly.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Indiana Jones-style escape from a closing stone door
video:video.video:description: A cinematic prompt describing a side-angle shot of a figure in silhouette (Indiana Jones tone) barely sliding under a massive, grinding stone door before it slams shut. The prompt focuses heavily on deep cinematic sound design, dust effects, and the transition from chaos to sudden silence.

video:video.video:title: Ultra-realistic downhill skateboard ride with cinematic cinematography
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for an ultra-realistic video of a girl performing a high-speed downhill skateboard ride. It specifies using Image 1 for character design, a Steadicam follow perspective, heavy motion blur, specific body movements for turns and acceleration, and a background featuring distant fireworks and an airplane.

video:video.video:title: Heartwarming special effect of being swarmed by fluffy kittens
video:video.video:description: A prompt for a joyful special effect video where the subject is suddenly swarmed by a large group of adorable, fluffy kittens and cats running in from all directions, creating a chaotic but cute pile of pets. The prompt emphasizes high fidelity fur texture, realistic interaction, and lively motion.

video:video.video:title: Technical animation of a levitating, exploding vintage television
video:video.video:description: A prompt for a technical animation style video showing a vintage orange television levitating and smoothly peeling apart into floating panels to reveal its internal circuitry in an 'exploded view.' The prompt emphasizes slow, fluid motion, high-detail textures, and cinematic quality.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic VFX war sequence with bullet-time tank shell firing
video:video.video:description: A highly specific cinematic VFX prompt for a war sequence, detailing a high-speed tracking shot on an Arri Alexa 65 focusing on a tank barrel. The scene transitions into bullet-time as the shell fires, capturing the shockwave, the projectile's flight, and the slow-motion impact on an armored vehicle, before snapping back to full speed.

video:video.video:title: One-take UGC video of a woman cutting a cake and a cat screaming
video:video.video:description: A detailed, one-take video prompt for a 14-second UGC-style clip shot on an iPhone front camera. The scene involves a woman cutting a realistic cake while a cat in the background uses digital CGI to display an exaggerated, comedic screaming reaction, complete with dramatic sound effects.

video:video.video:title: Multi-shot video prompt for a girl stealing earrings from an art museum at night
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot video prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a 15-second sequence where a girl guiltily climbs out of a picture frame in an art museum, steals earrings from a jewelry box, and climbs back in, ending with a cinematic reveal and voiceover. The prompt uses specific image references for different shots.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic VFX racing sequence with bullet-time rain effect

Both parts require specific camera work, rhythm, movie-like quality, martial arts choreography, and sound effects, while strictly avoiding blood/gore and dangerous actions. The assassin's face and pose must reference a second image (Image 2).

video:video.video:description: A detailed 15-second Seedance 2.0 prompt for a slice-of-life vlog style video featuring a girlfriend waking up in a cozy bedroom. The prompt specifies the style (iPhone original camera, low quality grain, dynamic blur), character appearance (referencing an image), scene setting, and breaks down the video into three distinct shots with specific actions, expressions, and camera work (close-ups, side angles) to convey a lazy, sweet, and authentic morning atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: 'What are you looking at?'
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene video prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a 'pure desire' style video featuring a cold-skinned girl with long curly hair and a crystal butterfly hairpin. The video is structured into five segments (First Encounter, Tossing Hair, Side Smile, Eye Contact, Looking Back) with specific camera work, atmosphere, and sound cues for each transition, aiming for a high-noise film grain, soft-focus, and low-resolution mobile photography feel.

video:video.video:title: Massive Ancient Sea Dragon Emerging from the Ocean
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a video of a massive ancient sea dragon emerging from a stormy, deep blue ocean. The prompt specifies the dragon's serpentine body, crashing waves, exploding water, detailed scales, and glowing eyes.

video:video.video:title: 2D Animated Fight Scene Between Goku and Naruto
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt in Tibetan for generating a 2D animated video depicting a fight between Goku and Naruto. The description focuses on the characters' actions, such as Goku's powerful head movements, numerous punches and kicks, and the resulting ground cracks and dust, contrasted with Naruto's quick body spins.

video:video.video:title: Seamless Sword Fight Sequence Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 Pro to generate a seamless, intense sword fight sequence between an armored knight and a giant horned monster in a snowy mountain setting, emphasizing cinematic camera angles and relentless action.

video:video.video:title: Dunhuang Flying Apsara Video Generation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-stage prompt for generating a 12-second video of a Dunhuang Flying Apsara (celestial being) emerging from a gilded mural, dancing, and transforming, with specific instructions for colors, movements, and background details across different time segments (0-2s, 2-4s, 4-6s, 6-8s, 8-10s, 10-12s).

video:video.video:title: Catastrophic Disaster Movie Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a high-urgency, catastrophic disaster movie sequence involving a bridge collapse, a massive wave, and a character named Tao Ge performing a dramatic escape.

video:video.video:title: Deadpan Absurdist Comedy Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, narrative-driven prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a street food vendor who freezes vegetables mid-air above a wok to answer a phone call, emphasizing freeze-frame physics and deadpan absurdist comedy.

video:video.video:title: Structured Chibi Character Animation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly structured JSON prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing four scenes of a chibi character animation, including descriptions, style, transitions, and output specifications.

video:video.video:title: Childhood Conversation Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed multi-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a warm, hopeful video showing a conversation between a child version and an adult version of the same person on a carousel, requiring two reference photos.

video:video.video:title: Hyper-realistic Football Action Shot Video
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a hyper-realistic, high-motion video of a chaotic football action shot, focusing on dynamic camera angles, motion blur, and cinematic quality.

video:video.video:title: Detailed Multi-Shot Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0, ViduQ3, and Kling 3.0 Comparison
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for video generation models (Seedance 2.0, ViduQ3, and Kling 3.0) to compare their performance. The prompt specifies the style as Japanese full-color 2D cel animation with 8K resolution, cinematic lighting, and a cyberpunk atmosphere. It outlines a three-shot sequence featuring a female dominator character with silver hair and a white suit, sitting on a throne against a wall of surveillance cameras, including specific camera movements, actions (like snapping fingers), and dialogue for each shot.

video:video.video:title: Video generation prompt for a cosplay model's foot and leg focus
video:video.video:description: A video generation prompt describing a scene where a real actor, dressed as a cosplay model at an exhibition, is filmed with an ultra-high-definition camera. The focus starts on her feet in high heels, moves slowly up her legs (wearing black stockings), and ends on her hips, with the final shot framing her chin, obscuring the full face.

video:video.video:title: Romantic Couple Interaction Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for generating a romantic video depicting a couple's intimate interaction. The scenes focus on soft lighting, a girl wrapped in a towel after washing her hair, drinking tea, and playful gestures from the first-person perspective, culminating in a sudden kiss on the camera.

video:video.video:title: Taiwanese Girlfriend Night Market POV Video
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for a 15-second vertical POV video simulating a handheld phone camera experience at a Taiwanese night market. The scene includes frequent exposure shifts, mixed lighting, ambient noise, and specific character actions and dialogue related to buying and eating salt-crisp chicken.

video:video.video:title: Hyperrealistic Close-up Video of Cosplay Model
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a hyperrealistic video of a female model at a cosplay convention. The video features a close-up shot focusing on her bare feet, slowly panning up to her hips, and finally resting on her chin, emphasizing extreme detail, texture, and subtle expressions, aiming for a cinematic 8K quality.

video:video.video:title: Sneaky Kitten Scrolling on Phone Under Covers
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a humorous, realistic video about a kitten secretly using a phone at night. The prompt specifies style, lighting, camera movements, and a narrative sequence involving the kitten hiding the phone when its mother approaches.

video:video.video:title: Anime Combat Scene: Knight vs. Shadow Monster
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a dynamic anime combat scene featuring a silver-haired knight fighting a horned shadow monster, including specific action sequences and camera work.

video:video.video:title: Hyperrealistic miniature diorama of a clay figure collapsing on a bed
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a hyperrealistic miniature diorama video using stop-motion clay animation style. The scene depicts a clay figure returning home exhausted on a Friday night, collapsing on a bed, and plugging a cable into his back to recharge.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Adventure Scene in Ancient Jungle Ruins
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic adventure sequence. It describes the setting (jungle ruins at sunrise), characters (explorers and a mysterious guide), camera movements (aerial descent, close-ups, circling), and dialogue, aiming for a dramatic, realistic, and epic film style.

video:video.video:title: Chinese Dreamscape Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A poetic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a Chinese-style dreamscape video, featuring blue and white porcelain transforming into a Pegasus and a paper crane flying through a window, set against a snowy, oriental aesthetic, offering an escape from a cyberpunk city.

video:video.video:title: Taiwanese Girlfriend POV Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed 15-second vertical video prompt for Seedance 2.0, simulating a first-person perspective (POV) selfie video of a Taiwanese girl sneaking out late at night to buy snacks at a 7-Eleven in Taipei, including specific lighting, camera shake, dialogue, and scene transitions.

video:video.video:title: Twelve Flower Goddess Transformation Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A simple prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a rhythmic video featuring the transformation of the Twelve Flower Goddesses, utilizing quick turns, costume changes, special effects, and push/pull camera movements synchronized to a beat.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Pure Love Narrative Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for generating a 15-second cinematic video using Seedance 2.0. The prompt specifies warm lighting, a 2.35:1 aspect ratio, camera movements (slow push-in), character actions (sleeping girl, watching boy), emotional beats, and specific sound effects (cicadas, turning pages), while explicitly forbidding watermarks or text overlays.

video:video.video:title: Wong Kar-wai style rainy phone booth scene
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to emulate the style of 90s Hong Kong Art Cinema, featuring a melancholic scene in a rainy phone booth with specific instructions for visual effects, lighting, and emotional performance.

video:video.video:title: Explorer discovering a hidden valley in the snow
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing an explorer's journey through a vast, silent snowscape, culminating in the discovery of a hidden, warm valley, utilizing specific camera cuts and emotional cues.

video:video.video:title: Harry S. Truman walking towards the camera
video:video.video:description: A multi-shot video generation prompt for Sora 2 or Seedance 2.0, describing Harry S. Truman getting out of a car and walking through a crowd of photographers, focusing on camera cuts and ambient sound.

video:video.video:title: Ragdoll cat attempts to steal fish at a red light
video:video.video:description: A humorous video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a scene at a red light where a ragdoll cat on a bicycle attempts to snatch a fish from a nearby basket, is startled by a car horn, and then glares and swipes angrily at the camera (POV shot).

video:video.video:title: Bus transforming into a Cybertronian mechanical giant caterpillar
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing the aggressive transformation of an old American-style bus into a grumpy, evil Cybertronian mechanical giant caterpillar, including specific details about the mechanical components, the driver's reaction, camera movement, and desired visual style.

video:video.video:title: Man working in a lab with ambient sound
video:video.video:description: A detailed video generation prompt for Seedance/Sora, describing a man working in a lab with multiple camera shots, specifically excluding music and talking, and requesting only ambient sound.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Japanese Action Anime Combat Prompt for Seedance 2
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for the Seedance 2.0 I2V (Image-to-Video) model, instructing the generation of a cinematic, full-color Japanese action anime scene. The scene features a character (referenced by an image) engaged in dynamic, fast-paced, close-quarters combat against an army of humanoid robots using a samurai sword. The prompt emphasizes dynamic cuts, superhuman abilities, ignoring physics, and a dark, cataclysmic robot uprising aesthetic.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Reveal of Tesla Cybertruck and Showroom
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, cinematic video generation prompt designed to showcase the effortless, silent birth of a complete Tesla ecosystem, blending magical engineering with minimalist design. It features a mysterious, glowing crate unfolding to reveal a Cybertruck and assemble a sleek showroom around it, complete with precise technical specifications, camera movements, audio mixing instructions, and quality control tags.

video:video.video:title: Modern Dance Performance Scene Description
video:video.video:description: A detailed description of a scene and cinematography for a modern dance performance. The setting is a dimly lit indoor home environment (modern kitchen/living room). The performer executes a highly rhythmic modern dance, conveying confidence and allure. The prompt specifies a fixed camera position, moderate depth of field, and single-sided lighting.

video:video.video:title: Girlfriend's Morning Greeting Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second video of a young girl's morning routine, styled as a casual, low-quality iPhone vlog, emphasizing her soft, sweet demeanor and specific actions like stretching and saying 'Good morning'.

video:video.video:title: Fox Spirit Transformation Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a fantasy video of a fox spirit transforming into a beautiful woman in a moonlit bamboo forest, emphasizing the visual style of ink painting and CG illustration, and focusing on the transformation process and the character's subsequent movements.

video:video.video:title: Epic Fantasy Awakening Video Prompt (Aerial Version)
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating an epic fantasy aerial video sequence, focusing on the visual awakening of a desolate land, using specific color palettes, extreme contrast lighting, and dynamic camera movements to convey a sense of grandeur and power.

video:video.video:title: A Bite of China Style New Year's Eve Dinner Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second cinematic food documentary short film, mimicking the style of 'A Bite of China' (舌尖上的中国), focusing on a Northern Chinese New Year's Eve dinner preparation, including specific camera movements, sound design, and narrative voiceover.

video:video.video:title: Wushan Wuxing Style High-Energy Fight Scene Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed, five-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-energy, stylized fight scene between two martial artists in the distinct national comic style of 'Wushan Wuxing' (Fog Hill of Five Elements), emphasizing intense action, dynamic camera work, and powerful visual effects like ink flow and speed lines.

video:video.video:title: Boyfriend POV Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-step video prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a hyper-realistic, pure and innocent style video of a girl in a cozy living room setting from the first-person perspective of her boyfriend, including specific dialogue and actions for a playful interaction.

video:video.video:title: Four Seasons Skateboard/Snowboard Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a continuous, first-person POV video of a character skateboarding and then snowboarding, transitioning seamlessly through the four seasons (Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter) with corresponding changes in clothing, scenery, and action, maintaining a 2D anime style and cinematic quality.

video:video.video:title: Ultra-Cinematic Sci-Fi Megacity Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: This is a detailed prompt designed for generating a continuous shot video in an ultra-cinematic, photorealistic sci-fi style. It specifies a dense, futuristic megacity setting with noir cyberpunk elements, emphasizing high contrast, metallic reflections, neon accents, and volumetric rain haze. The core instruction is for ONE continuous shot with aggressive camera movement.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Shibuya Sprint Sequence Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, continuous cinematic shot prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a high-energy action sequence featuring a Japanese schoolgirl sprinting through the Shibuya crosswalk, incorporating specific audio cues, camera movements (low push, side-roll, explosive jump, rotation), and a dramatic mid-air music cut.

video:video.video:title: Sci-fi Cinematic 360-Degree Rotation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, two-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, set in a Hollywood Sci-fi style. It describes a violent corkscrew maneuver inside a spaceship, focusing on a couple (Darrow and Victra) bracing themselves, sharing a desperate kiss mid-rotation, and culminating in Victra slamming Darrow's visor down as the ship takes impact and the camera completes a 360-degree rotation.

video:video.video:title: Uzbek Puppet Stop-Motion Narrative Prompt
video:video.video:description: A long, detailed, two-part stop-motion narrative prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring an Uzbek woman puppet. The first part describes a quiet tea-drinking scene, and the second describes a vigorous cooking scene (kneading dough and baking samsas in a tandoor), using [cut] markers for scene changes and specifying materials and camera angles.

video:video.video:title: WWI Continuous Tracking Shot Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on a single, continuous, side-parallel tracking shot of a WWI soldier sprinting across a chaotic battlefield during an assault, specifying camera technique, setting, action, and technical parameters.

video:video.video:title: Sci-Fi Black Supercar Transforming into a Humanoid Robot
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a dynamic video sequence showing a deep gray, futuristic black supercar speeding on a city highway, which then seamlessly transforms mid-motion into a giant humanoid mechanical robot. The scene is captured with a low-angle tracking shot that tilts up during the transformation.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Skincare Product Ad (Scene 1)
video:video.video:description: The first part of a multi-scene Seedance 2.0 prompt for a skincare product advertisement, showing a young Asian woman looking tired and distressed by her dull, oily skin in a bathroom mirror.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: 80s Hong Kong Zombie Movie
video:video.video:description: A Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a video clip in the style of an 80s Hong Kong zombie movie, featuring a dilapidated temple, pale moonlight, film grain, and a hopping Qing Dynasty zombie.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: High-Speed Skateboard Chase
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a high-speed video following a 3D anime girl skateboarding down a steep mountain road, using a first-person perspective and wide-angle lens.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Guangzhou City Montage (Part 1)
video:video.video:description: The first part of a detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a cinematic video montage of Guangzhou, featuring traditional and modern elements, specific camera movements, and scene transitions.

video:video.video:title: Flute Transition and Transformation Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for a video featuring a girl performing a transformation (change of clothes/style) triggered by spinning and tossing a flute. The prompt specifies the initial scene, the action sequence, the style of the transformed scene (photorealistic, rich texture, deep background), and requirements for music synchronization and slow-motion effects.

video:video.video:title: Taiwanese Girlfriend Series: Rainy Day POV
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-segment prompt for a 15-second vertical video (9:16) featuring a Taiwanese girl in a POV style. The scene is set in a rainy Taipei street, focusing on the texture of wet clothes, handheld camera shake, and specific dialogue and actions across different time segments.

video:video.video:title: Fantasy Title Sequence Animation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for creating an opening title sequence animation for the phrase '哥飞出海' (Ge Fei Chu Hai) in a mystical/fantasy style. It details the progression from absolute blackness to the formation of the text using particle streams, sword energy, ink splatters, and dynamic light effects, emphasizing a 'sword slicing the mountain' visual tension.

video:video.video:title: High-Heel Dance Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a dynamic 15-second dance video set to the music 'Hot Love Ice Cream'. It specifies the character's appearance (slim, long legs, tight dress, sheer stockings, high heels) and detailed camera movements, starting with a close-up on the heels and transitioning to a full-body shot.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic 4K Military CGI Scene
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-segment prompt for a 15-second ultra-widescreen (2.35:1) cinematic video, focusing on a chaotic yet organized military convoy in a snowy battlefield. It specifies technical details like 4K CGI, 24fps, camera movements (close-up, pull-out, quick cut), realistic effects (muzzle flash, heat distortion, armor wear), and sound design, while prohibiting uniformity and watermarks.

video:video.video:title: Seedance Prompt #795
video:video.video:description: Seedance Prompt #795

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Generation Prompt for Text Effects
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video featuring dynamic text effects, focusing on the character '李岳' (Li Yue), with specific instructions for visuals, camera movement, sound effects, particle systems, lighting, material properties, and post-processing.

video:video.video:title: Detailed Scene Prompt for Zombie Chase
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt specifying the scene, actors, and environment for a video generation, describing a panicked runner being chased by decayed zombies in an abandoned, fog-filled city street at night.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Prompting Structure Example
video:video.video:description: This tweet advises users to prompt like a filmmaker using the structure: Action → Camera → Emotion / Sound, and provides a detailed example prompt following this structure.

video:video.video:title: Battlefield Survival Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A simple, multi-shot narrative prompt for video generation (Sora 2/Seedance 2.0) depicting a soldier waking up on a battlefield, witnessing others fleeing, and attempting to get up while enemy airplanes fly overhead. It uses [cut] markers for scene transitions.

video:video.video:title: Premium Ice Cream Sundae Commercial
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a premium commercial photograph of an ice cream sundae, emphasizing vibrant lighting, a white background, and an exploded vertical layer view for a dessert ad style.

video:video.video:title: Train Chase Cinematic Sequence
video:video.video:description: A multi-cut prompt designed for cinematic AI video generation (Sora 2/Seedance 2.0) depicting a short action scene involving a woman, a briefcase, and a chase through a train.

video:video.video:title: Colossal Feline Titan Rising from the Ocean
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, epic cinematic prompt comparing Seedance 2.0 and Grok Imagine, describing a massive feline titan rising from a stormy ocean and destroying a navy fleet with an energy beam.

video:video.video:title: The Saddest Story Told in Stop-Motion Clay Animation
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-cut prompt for a stop-motion clay animation short film, depicting a tragic love story between figures with a matchbox head and a candle head, interrupted by a figure with a fire extinguisher head.

video:video.video:title: Product Replacement in Video
video:video.video:description: A prompt demonstrating the object replacement capability of Doubao-Seedance-2.0, instructing the AI to replace a perfume bottle in a video with a cream jar from a static image while preserving the original motion and camera work.

video:video.video:title: Prison Cell Dialogue Prompt
video:video.video:description: A simple, multi-shot narrative prompt for video generation (Sora 2/Seedance 2.0) depicting a conversation between a prisoner and a female guard, using [cut] markers to define camera angles and scene transitions, with a focus on dialogue delivery.

video:video.video:title: Zombie Hunter Supermarket Scene
video:video.video:description: A high-action cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing a zombie hunter entering an overrun supermarket for supplies, getting attacked, and escaping alone.

video:video.video:title: Dark Fantasy Golem and Fairy Cinematic Sequence
video:video.video:description: A complex, multi-shot cinematic sequence prompt for Seedance 2.0, spanning 15 seconds with specific timestamps for scene transitions, detailing the interaction between a stone golem and a luminous fairy by a tranquil lake.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Descent on a Brutalist Rooftop
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a lone woman on a brutalist building at sunrise, featuring a complex camera movement from an aerial wide shot to a close profile, emphasizing cinematic lighting and film texture.

video:video.video:title: Comparison Prompt for Kling 3 and Seedance 2
video:video.video:description: A user shares the prompt used to compare Kling 3 and Seedance 2 video generation, noting that Kling 3 misinterpreted the 'selfie' aspect of the prompt. The prompt describes a 360-degree panoramic camera selfie inside a sweets shop, followed by a woman posing in various scenes with costume changes.

video:video.video:title: 12-Second Quick Change Collection
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a 12-second video collection of quick outfit changes, requiring the character's face and bone structure to remain 100% consistent with the reference image. The sequence involves five contrasting styles (JK Lolita, British, Lolita, OL, Dark/Subculture) using a 'hand flick transition' strictly timed to a fast-paced, energetic music track.

video:video.video:title: Wuhan City Promotional Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed, structured prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a promotional video about the city of Wuhan, capturing its blend of historical charm and modern urban life. The prompt specifies subjects, actions, scenes, camera movements (FPV drone), and desired cinematic quality and constraints.

video:video.video:title: First-Person Wuxia Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a video in a first-person POV, styled as ink-wash wuxia (Chinese martial arts aesthetic). It specifies technical requirements like 4K ultra HD, perfectly synced audio/visuals, cinematic camera movement, precise beat matching, silky smooth transitions, high immersion, and requires a real person without face swapping.

video:video.video:title: Lace Mini Skirt Model Display Sequence
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a video sequence featuring a beautiful woman in a white lace mini skirt, performing a series of actions (entering, turning, lifting leg, covering face, posing) in a natural light setting with a simple background. The prompt specifies smooth, continuous motion and soft color tones.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Luxurious Night Scene Interaction
video:video.video:description: A detailed, narrative-driven Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a vertical, realistic video featuring a high-class Asian woman in a luxury suite, interacting with the viewer (first-person perspective) with a seductive line and slow, elegant movements.

video:video.video:title: The Cinematic Master Prompt (Image and Video)
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, structured prompt for generating both an image (using Nano Banana 2) and a 10-second video (using Seedance 1.5 Pro) of a neo-noir urban scene, focusing on architectural massing and atmospheric effects.

video:video.video:title: BRAIN DRAIN Stop-Motion Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, narrative-driven prompt for Seedance 2, describing a hyperrealistic miniature stop-motion animation about a clay man whose brain shrinks with every question he types into a chat interface.

video:video.video:title: Morning Wake-Up Scene Prompt for Seedance 2
video:video.video:description: A detailed, narrative prompt for Seedance 2 describing a woman waking up in bed, her movements, expressions, and dialogue, focusing on a sleepy, affectionate, and light-sensitive mood in the morning light.

video:video.video:title: Kaiju Battle Video Generation Prompt for Seedance 2
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2 to generate a tokusatsu (special effects) video depicting a giant monster battle between two characters, focusing on specific combat actions like punching, kicking, guarding, beam attacks, and a judo throw.

video:video.video:title: Hollywood Blockbuster Style - Blue Cat vs. Giant Dragon
video:video.video:description: This is the first segment of a Seedance 2.0 prompt designed to generate a Hollywood-style blockbuster scene featuring a blue cat (likely Doraemon, given the context of '蓝胖') battling a giant dragon. The prompt specifies a realistic CG render, HDR high dynamic color, and sets the scene with a wide aerial shot of a modern city skyline at dusk, emphasizing a dramatic, ominous atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Shenzhen Tourism Promotional Video
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-segment prompt for generating a fast-paced, high-tech promotional video for Shenzhen tourism, blending cyberpunk aesthetics with tropical coastline scenery using FPV drone shots, hyperlapse, and high-density fragmented editing to showcase the 'Shenzhen Speed'.

video:video.video:title: Zibo City Promotional Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a vibrant, cinematic video promoting the city of Zibo, blending modern cityscapes with ancient architecture, featuring fast cuts, neon lighting, and strong rhythmic audio.

video:video.video:title: Dramatic Identity Reversal Short Drama
video:video.video:description: A detailed, time-coded Seedance 2.0 prompt for a 15-second dramatic short video about a wealthy young master trying to dismiss a woman with 5 million yuan, only for her to reveal her true identity as the major shareholder acquiring his family's company, featuring specific dialogue, camera shots, and sound effects for maximum dramatic impact.

video:video.video:title: When I Get Ready for Bed: Couple Cuddling Scene
video:video.video:description: A multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 10-second video depicting a couple getting ready for bed in a modern hotel room. The scene focuses on the man (with gold/black hair, silk pajamas) cuddling into the woman's chest (long black hair, white T-shirt) and her subsequent actions of covering him with a blanket and holding him tightly. The prompt includes specific dialogue/subtitle changes corresponding to the actions.

video:video.video:title: First-Person Perspective Couple Interaction Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, narrative-style prompt for Seedance-2.0 designed to generate a highly realistic and intimate couple interaction video from a first-person male perspective. The scene progresses from the female character relaxing on a sofa to a sudden, playful confrontation after the viewer touches her leg, culminating in her playfully tackling the viewer onto the sofa.

video:video.video:title: Taiwanese Girlfriend Series - Cinematic Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for generating a 15-second vertical video (9:16) with a film grain filter, set on the Tamsui River bank in Taipei during sunset. The video features a Taiwanese girl interacting with the camera (Handheld POV), including specific actions, dialogue, and camera movements (Smooth Pan, Handheld acceleration) across five distinct time segments. It explicitly forbids text, subtitles, logos, or watermarks.

video:video.video:title: Guangzhou Tourism Promotional Video Prompt (Seedance 2.0)
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt used to create a promotional video for Guangzhou tourism. It specifies subjects, actions, scenes, camera work (FPV, 180-degree rotation), style (8K, cinematic, New Chinese aesthetics, cyber future), and constraints for stability and realism.

video:video.video:title: Cat Making Pancakes (Jianbing) - Seedance Cute Pet Series
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-step prompt for generating a video in the Seedance Cute Pet Series, featuring a highly skilled cat making traditional Chinese pancakes (Jianbing) on a street food stall. The prompt specifies the character (Cat), the setting (city street breakfast stall), fixed camera angle, and a sequence of complex, continuous actions performed by the cat, including scraping batter, cracking an egg, spreading the egg, folding the pancake, brushing sauce, adding fillings, cutting the pancake, and handing it to the camera.

video:video.video:title: Midjourney Oil Painting Prompt (Driver's Hand)
video:video.video:description: A Midjourney prompt for generating an oil painting image of a driver's hand on the steering wheel while driving along a road over wooded hills. It includes specific style reference parameters.

video:video.video:title: LLM Memory Dump Prompt (for Claude/ChatGPT)
video:video.video:description: A detailed system prompt designed to be used with LLMs like ChatGPT to extract or 'dump' all stored memories, background information, preferences, and instructions the user has given the model, formatted into a single code block for migration to another service like OpenClaw.

video:video.video:title: Ultra-realistic Macro Miniature City Prompt (Structured JSON)
video:video.video:description: A highly structured, detailed JSON prompt used for generating an ultra-realistic macro miniature city model, utilizing Nano Banana 2 for structure and Seedance 2.0 for motion.

video:video.video:title: Primal Race Quick Cut Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt designed for image-to-video generation in Seedance 2.0, focusing on a rapid, intense, and beat-synced cinematic race sequence with quick cuts.

video:video.video:title: Anime Girl Skateboarding Transformation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed video prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a fast-paced FPV drone shot following an anime girl skateboarding down a mountain road, featuring a seamless environmental transformation from summer to winter mid-shot.

video:video.video:title: Dynamic Sword Fight on a Neon-Lit Rooftop
video:video.video:description: A prompt used to generate a video in Seedance 2.0 featuring two female warriors engaged in an intense, cinematic sword fight on a neon-lit rooftop.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for High-Contrast Modern Dance Video
video:video.video:description: A highly technical prompt for Seedance 2.0 specifying the visual style, scene, camera techniques, and action sequence for a vertical 9:16 video of a young woman performing a modern dance in a high-contrast, low-key lighting environment, emphasizing rhythm synchronization and a confident, alluring mood.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Title Animation Prompt: 'Slaying Immortals' (Zhan Xian)
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-stage prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second video animation of the title '斩仙' (Slaying Immortals) in a powerful, ice-jade, and ink-wash style. The prompt meticulously describes the visual effects, timing, sound effects, color grading (cyan-blue), and technical parameters (motion intensity 0.75, effect intensity 0.85) across five distinct 3-second segments, from chaotic beginning to final static display.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Anime Style White-Haired Girl
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an anime/Guofeng 2D style video featuring a white-haired girl with a cold, elegant appearance, transitioning from a calm state to a dramatic scene involving lightning and a water dragon.

video:video.video:title: Man Driving Recklessly (Multi-Scene Video Prompt)
video:video.video:description: A multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video depicting a man leaving his house, getting into a car, starting the engine (with a detail about a flower on the dashboard), and then driving wildly and crashing into objects, all without music.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for 'Card Check' Transition Video
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, time-coded, and technically specific prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 10-second video transition sequence, starting with a character manipulating a single card and ending in a dramatic reveal of a new, alluring identity (cat-eared figure). The prompt specifies camera angles, movement dynamics, lighting, and visual effects, strictly prohibiting certain artifacts like extra card particles.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for 'Twin Duel' Ink Style Video
video:video.video:description: A detailed, time-coded prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an action sequence video titled 'Twin Duel' using a dynamic ink wash painting style, focusing on the clash between red and blue figures and their resulting ink effects.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Cinematic City Promotional Video
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic, New Chinese Style promotional video for the city of Xiamen, focusing on specific color palettes, narrative arcs (from sacred to modern life), sound design, and time-coded scene descriptions.

video:video.video:title: FPV Drone Shot of Anime Girl Skateboarding
video:video.video:description: A video prompt describing a fast-paced, first-person view (FPV) drone tracking shot following a 3D anime-style girl with white hair as she skateboards at high speed down a steep, winding mountain road. The prompt emphasizes extreme forward momentum and a wide-angle perspective.

video:video.video:title: Spider-Man vs. Sun Wukong Cinematic Battle
video:video.video:description: A cinematic prompt detailing an epic battle scene between Spider-Man and Sun Wukong (the Monkey King) set on the rooftops of ancient Chinese temples during a golden sunset. It specifies the characters' actions and appearance.

video:video.video:title: Chinese Paper-Cut Animation Style Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: The first section of a prompt for generating a video in the style of traditional Chinese paper-cut animation, focusing on the initial scene setup with specific colors and textures.

video:video.video:title: Bronx Zombie Movie Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a funny movie scene where people in 1980s Bronx suddenly turn into running zombies.

video:video.video:title: Obelisk The Tormentor Punch Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt used with Seedance 2.0 to generate a scene of the character Obelisk The Tormentor executing a punch, emphasizing high quality and perfect physics/anatomy.

video:video.video:title: Seedance Prompt #359
video:video.video:description: Seedance Prompt #359

video:video.video:title: Seedance Prompt #353
video:video.video:description: Seedance Prompt #353

video:video.video:title: Gundam Transformation Video Prompt (Seedance 2.0)
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a realistic, sci-fi mecha transformation video in the style of Hollywood visual effects. The prompt specifies a character based on a reference image, a heavy industrial 80-meter tall mecha, cinematic camera work (handheld, slow push, wide-angle), and a dramatic transformation sequence from a human pilot to a giant mecha landing in the ocean.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Multi-Clip Video Prompt: Immortal Apprentice
video:video.video:description: An extremely long and detailed multi-clip video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, creating a 15-second video about an 'Immortal Apprentice' (Xiao Shimei) in an ancient, ethereal setting. The prompt specifies the style, total duration, character design, background, and detailed actions and camera movements for six individual 2.5-second clips, including specific instructions for the 'one-click copy' generation commands.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Aerial Dogfight over Thai Temple
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-scene video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an aerial dogfight between a black-gold heavy mech fighter and a silver streamlined fighter piloted by a female cyborg, set over a grand Thai temple complex at dawn. The prompt specifies camera angles, composition, atmosphere, and audio for each of the seven clips.

video:video.video:title: Seamless Four-Season Skate/Snowboard Journey Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a seamless, one-shot video of an anime-style girl skateboarding and snowboarding through the four seasons. The prompt specifies complex camera movements (first-person POV, ultra-wide angle, slight shake), precise action choreography (standard movements, no distortion), smooth seasonal transitions, and audio matching the action rhythm.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Dance Video Generation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a video of a beautiful girl dancing to Future House music. The prompt specifies the style (live-action), the girl's appearance (black long hair, slip dress based on image 1, fair skin), the dance moves (playful hip sway, arm waves, fixed poses synchronized with the beat), camera movement (push/pull tracking with the beat), setting (bedroom with soft spotlights), aspect ratio (9:16), and negative prompts.

video:video.video:title: Viral Game Comedy Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly structured video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, specifying format details (15s, multi-cut, 6 beats, high-viral game comedy) and detailing two subjects: a spirited young customer and a charismatic shrimp chef.

video:video.video:title: Bus Disassembly and Reorganization
video:video.video:description: A prompt describing a surreal scene where an old, oversized American-style bus in a forest parking lot violently disassembles and reorganizes itself, while a young Asian driver reacts in shock.

video:video.video:title: Adventurer on Dragon Approaching Pirate Ship
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a video scene of an adventurer mounted on a dragon soaring towards an unsuspecting pirate ship on a choppy sea. The description focuses on the action, the dragon's appearance, and the setting.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Beach Scene with Sandworm and Warrior
video:video.video:description: A detailed, two-part prompt for generating a high-action, cinematic video sequence featuring a massive Dune-style sandworm bursting out of a beach and a warrior igniting a purple lightsaber to fight it. The prompt emphasizes dynamic camera work, epic VFX, and photorealistic compositing.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Gugu Gaga on a Mountain Top
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 3D CGI kawaii animation of an ultra-cute anthropomorphic penguin girl (Gugu Gaga) standing on a snowy rock in a majestic mountain landscape, featuring soft cinematic lighting and a dreamy atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Gugu Gaga Harvesting Cuteness
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an ultra-cute 3D chibi anime animation of the penguin girl Gugu Gaga harvesting resources, focusing on fluffy textures, rhythmic movements, and a wholesome kawaii mood.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Gugugaga Penguin Figurines
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a smooth, fluid AI animation of multiple cute chibi Gugugaga penguin characters displayed as 3D figurines on a shiny white plate, featuring subtle movements and a slow camera pan.

video:video.video:title: Kawaii chibi penguin-girl dancing prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an ultra-detailed, hyper-cute kawaii 3D CGI TikTok animation of a chibi penguin-girl hybrid named Yuki performing a playful 'gugugaga dance' in a cozy modern living room setting, specifying character design, scene, motion, and cinematic details.

video:video.video:title: Cyberpunk Trailer from Image Reference
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 Omni to create a 15-second video trailer with a dark, cyberpunk vibe, using an uploaded image as a live-action reference.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Melancholic Chibi Penguin in Snow
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to create an ultra-detailed 3D CGI animation of a small, sad chibi penguin struggling through deep snow, focusing on emotional storytelling, low-angle tracking, and Pixar quality.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: ATV Racing in a Desert Sandstorm
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a first-person POV video of an ATV racing through a massive desert sandstorm, including visibility drops, lightning flashes, and a jump near a cargo convoy.

video:video.video:title: Gothic Airship Transformation
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an anime-style video of a girl standing on a massive gothic airship bridge at night, where the background gradually transforms from a dark sky into a scorched, burning wasteland, emphasizing a dark, haunting atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Kanuragan Action-Comedy Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an Eastern action-comedy scene (15 seconds, one continuous take) where an elderly inner-power master in a traditional martial arts hall (padepokan) effortlessly blasts away four students with minimal touch, emphasizing exaggerated action and Javanese mysticism atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Giant Prehistoric Beast Wakes Up in the Desert
video:video.video:description: A comparison of video generation models (Seedance 1.5 Pro, Kling 3.0, Pollo 2.5, Sora 2, Veo 3.1) using the same prompt to generate a scene of a giant prehistoric beast waking up in the desert and roaring. The tweet asks users to vote for their favorite result.

video:video.video:title: Shrimp Wars Animation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing an animation titled 'Shrimp Wars,' which is a playful duel involving tossing shrimp, designed to be rhythmic and engaging.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Drone Dive into a Person's Eye
video:video.video:description: A complex, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 (Text-to-Video) that generates a 10-second cinematic sequence. It starts with an ultra-realistic, high-altitude drone shot of a woman in Tokyo, accelerates into an extreme close-up, and then transitions seamlessly (match cut) into a surreal, dreamlike inner world through her eye, detailing camera movements, lighting transitions, and visual effects for both the real and fantasy segments.

video:video.video:title: First-Person POV Flying Broomstick Video Generation
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a first-person POV video of a young Japanese woman flying on a broomstick over famous Tokyo landmarks (Shibuya, Senso-ji, Torii gates). The prompt specifies cinematic parameters, character details (hands, legs, clothing), framing rules (POV lock, lower 30% for hands/broom), scene progression (take-off, acceleration, specific locations), camera motion, lighting, and mood, aiming for a hyper-realistic, immersive travel experience.

video:video.video:title: Kamen Rider Villain Transformation Sequence Video
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, 10-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic transformation video. It describes a Japanese woman being taken over by a dark energy, morphing from a casual look in an apartment into a sleek, dark villain outfit, complete with specific timing for emotional changes, lighting shifts (soft daylight to high contrast), particle effects, and sound design cues, culminating in a sinister look directly into the camera.

video:video.video:title: Epic Fantasy War Video Generation in Extreme Cold Environment
video:video.video:description: A detailed, two-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to create an epic fantasy war film sequence. The first part focuses on a lone female warrior standing against a horde of wild men in a blizzard, emphasizing cinematic camera work, sound effects (no music), and tension. The second part continues the sequence with the sudden appearance of a giant dragon, shifting the focus to the dragon's attack and the warrior's renewed resolve.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Chinese Ink Style Cat vs Dog Battle Prompt
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a high-energy, Chinese ink-style (Wushan Wuxing/Fog Hill of Five Elements) battle video between a 'Knife-Shield Dog' and a 'Banana Cat'. The prompt details the characters, their elemental attributes (Fire/Metal/Earth vs. Water/Wood/Ice), the high-contrast red/black/gold color palette, and four distinct, action-packed camera sequences leading to a massive elemental clash climax.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Chinese Fantasy CG Prompt: Calligraphy Magic
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a top-tier Chinese fantasy CG video. The scene features a white-robed immortal on a giant jade platform, using a jade brush to write powerful golden calligraphy that transforms into a massive 'Heavenly Dao' character array to destroy a target, emphasizing high saturation, gold and ink fusion, and extreme visual impact.

video:video.video:title: Epic Chinese Fantasy CG Video: Four Arts of the Scholar
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-saturation, surreal CG video in the style of top-tier Chinese fantasy animation.
