The video depicts a character mastering the 'Four Arts' (Qin/Lute, Qi/Chess, Shu/Calligraphy, Hua/Painting) in a grand, stylized sequence set on a cloud sea, culminating in a massive ink wash painting.

video:video.video:title: Sitcom Dialogue Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for a wide-shot video scene featuring two friends talking excitedly with 'dumb voices,' including specific dialogue and camera directions (close-ups) for a comedic effect.

video:video.video:title: Nezha vs. Monkey King Martial Arts Video Prompt (Seedance 2.0)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-octane martial arts battle between Nezha and the Monkey King in the style of the Chinese animated series 'Fog Hill of Five Elements' (Wushan Wuxing). The prompt specifies dual-wielding weapons, intense close combat, cinematic camera work, and an epic, evenly matched confrontation.

video:video.video:title: Bentley S2 Continental ASMR Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a 15-second, multi-cut cinematic realism video focused on luxury car ASMR. The subject is a cream and silver Bentley S2 Continental, detailing its classic luxury features like chrome, wood veneer, and quilted leather.

video:video.video:title: Continuous Shot Astronaut Video Prompt (Seedance 2.0 Omni)
video:video.video:description: A prompt used with Seedance 2.0 and Seedance 2.0 Omni, specifying a 15-second, one continuous shot video with high-tension cinematic realism. The subject is a lone astronaut in a worn white EVA suit.

video:video.video:title: Colossal Prehistoric Shark Attack Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a dramatic video scene featuring a colossal prehistoric great white shark, the size of a skyscraper, erupting from a stormy ocean. The shark is shown crushing a massive steel cargo container ship, with containers shattering and the vessel splitting apart, captured as the camera opens.

video:video.video:title: Wartime Disaster Movie Scene, One-Shot
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 Pro, designed to generate a continuous, one-shot scene from a wartime disaster movie. The scene follows a young messenger running through a shelled trench, past explosions and fleeing crowds, culminating in him firing a signal flare from a ruined bell tower, emphasizing realism, strong rhythm, and no cuts.

video:video.video:title: Ancient Egyptian Warrior vs. Nile Mud Beast
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a brutal action scene of an ancient Egyptian warrior king fighting a cursed Nile mud beast in flooded temple ruins at night, focusing on close-camera work, heavy rain, and khopesh combat.

video:video.video:title: Zero-Gravity Rotating Corridor Fight
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for a 15-second sci-fi action sequence in one continuous take, depicting a zero-gravity fight between an agent and security personnel inside a slowly rotating high-tech transport ship corridor, emphasizing the use of the environment and constant change of spatial direction.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Honeybee Nectar Collection
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, instructing the generation of a video showing honeybees collecting nectar on a sunflower in a vibrant, lush garden with a sparkling waterfall, emphasizing ultra-realism, soft lighting, and smooth camera movement.

video:video.video:title: Crimson Relic-War Transformation and Angel Fight
video:video.video:description: An ultra-cinematic, 15-second live-action prompt requiring three reference images for character design. It describes a woman transforming into a crimson relic-war form in an abandoned financial district and immediately engaging in a fast, violent fight with a radiant angelic war-saint.

video:video.video:title: White Tiger Hunter in Glacial Canyon
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for a 15-second photorealistic sequence generated by Seedance 2, depicting a massive glacier tiger stalking prey in a vast frozen valley under pale twilight. The prompt includes specific camera angles (predator-eye POV), action choreography (sprint, massive leap), and a velocity ramp effect.

video:video.video:title: Action Comedy: Old Master in Hotel Lobby
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for a 15-second action comedy short film in one continuous take, featuring an elderly legendary martial arts master who casually defeats over ten attackers in a luxurious hotel lobby without changing his expression, resulting in absurd humor and chaos.

video:video.video:title: Action Comedy: Polite Master in Dojo
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for a 15-second Eastern action-comedy short film in one continuous take, set inside a wooden dojo. An elderly master attempts a 'gentle balance demonstration' but accidentally sends students flying with light touches, creating an absurd and stunned atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Dark Warrior vs Lava Dragon Cinematic Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A structured JSON prompt for Seedance 2.0, generated via Yapper, detailing a dark fantasy cinematic scene where a girl transforms into a dark warrior and defeats a lava dragon in a ruined city.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Manga Romance: Confession on an Overpass
video:video.video:description: A video prompt for an 8K ultra-detailed cinematic manga romance scene set on an after-school spring overpass. The scene involves a shy girl and a quiet dark-haired boy, focusing on a sharp gust of wind tearing a confession sketch from her notebook and slapping it against the boy's chest during the first three seconds.

video:video.video:title: Cyberpunk Romance Scene: School Anniversary Night
video:video.video:description: A video generation prompt for an 8K ultra-detailed cyberpunk romance cinema scene set during a school anniversary night. The scene is described with holographic cherry blossoms, floating lantern swarms, glossy rain-wet pavement, candy-colored neon, and a giant skyline ferris wheel, focusing on two student lovers.

video:video.video:title: Sci-Fi Action Scene: Woman in Adaptive Suit vs. Tactical Enforcers
video:video.video:description: A detailed video prompt for generating an 8K ultra-detailed sci-fi action scene featuring a beautiful adult woman in a white-silver adaptive tech suit fighting five male tactical enforcers inside a red-alert alien mothership corridor. The prompt specifies details of the suit, including blue energy seams, a glowing forearm blade, and a magnetic shield.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Epic Fantasy Aerial Dragon Attack
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an epic, tense, and realistic fantasy video of a male rider on a black-scaled dragon patrolling the air, spotting a ground threat, and unleashing a torrent of fire. The prompt specifies 9 distinct camera shots and actions, focusing on high contrast and dark cinematic quality.

video:video.video:title: Close-up of a parrot getting a haircut, scene 1
video:video.video:description: The first scene of a video prompt detailing a close-up shot of a parrot receiving a haircut. The prompt specifies the parrot's appearance, the stylist's actions, and the lighting conditions.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Giant Asian Man Destroying Warships
video:video.video:description: A 15-second, action-packed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic video of a giant, angry middle-aged Asian man in a white suit rising from the Red Sea. He uses a giant handgun to explode warships, then tears a cruiser in half, stomps another, and finally crushes a fighter jet with his bare hand.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Fashion Commercial for Adam Hat Brand
video:video.video:description: A detailed, time-segmented prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second commercial video for the 'Adam' hat brand, featuring a young Asian woman. The prompt specifies four distinct camera shots (Close-up, Macro, Orbit, Pull Back) and visual styles (IMAX, film grain, shallow depth of field).

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Chinese Fantasy CG Prompt: Painter Immortal
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a top-tier Chinese fantasy CG video. The scene features a 'Painter Immortal' in a massive underground rock cave. The immortal uses a glowing jade brush to paint, transforming the dark cave into a vibrant, deadly fairy realm of rapidly growing plants and attacking creatures, which then collapses and is collected back into a single scroll painting.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Mahjong Scene with Masseuses
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second light comedy video set in a Chengdu mahjong hall, featuring four young men playing mahjong while being massaged by women in Qipaos. The prompt specifies scene duration, camera movements (Slow Pan, Dolly In, Smooth Orbit, Gradual Pull Out), lighting, and sound effects.

video:video.video:title: Romero Britto style video prompt
video:video.video:description: A multi-shot prompt for generating a video in the style of Romero Britto, showing two men playing chess, emphasizing colorful pop-art aesthetics, bold lines, and geometric patterns, with specified camera cuts and close-ups.

video:video.video:title: Van Gogh style video prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a video in the style of Van Gogh, depicting a lone man in a small wooden boat adrift on turbulent, glowing waves beneath a swirling, star-filled sky, specifying camera movement, color palette, texture, and motion blur.

video:video.video:title: Sci-fi superhero duel prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a blockbuster sci-fi duel video between an armored male striker and a female plasma-blade duelist inside a near-future reactor core chamber, specifying realistic body proportions.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic cat action comedy prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating an 8K ultra-detailed, cinematic master look video of a comic-style cat action comedy with shonen energy, set in an ancient-style inn during a night battle, specifying lighting and environment details.

video:video.video:title: Leopard Prowling Through a Surreal Forest in Henri Rousseau Style
video:video.video:description: A video prompt for Seedance 2.0, detailing a side tracking shot of a leopard moving gracefully through a surreal, blue-hued forest with an amber glow, evoking an otherworldly dusk, rendered in the style of Henri Rousseau.

video:video.video:title: Solitary Figure Rising at Dusk in J. M. W. Turner Style
video:video.video:description: A multi-cut video prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a solitary figure rising from a stone ledge beside a misty river at dusk, with the sun burning through the haze, followed by close-up shots of his feet walking past skulls, rendered in the style of J. M. W. Turner.

video:video.video:title: Women Placing Glowing Lanterns on Water in Hieronymus Bosch Style
video:video.video:description: A video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, depicting women in white robes placing glowing lanterns onto a dark river, followed by a cut to the water catching fire and spreading golden light, rendered in the style of Hieronymus Bosch.

video:video.video:title: Car Driving Through Melting Clocks Canyon in Salvador Dalí Style
video:video.video:description: A multi-cut video prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a surreal scene in the style of Salvador Dalí. A car drives through a canyon where massive clocks melt, watched by a colossal stone face, including close-ups of the spinning wheels.

video:video.video:title: Dreamlike Kiss in Franz Marc Style
video:video.video:description: A video prompt for Seedance 2.0, detailing a couple kissing in a colorful, dreamlike painting style inspired by Franz Marc. The scene features flowing flowers, swirling patterns, and swans, with the camera slowly moving toward the embracing couple.

video:video.video:title: Monk Placing a Glowing Flame in Hieronymus Bosch Style
video:video.video:description: A video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a monk placing a glowing flame on cracked earth, followed by a smooth 360° camera circle revealing a surreal landscape, all rendered in the style of Hieronymus Bosch.

video:video.video:title: Vertical Action Insertion: Tactical Courier Freefall
video:video.video:description: A two-part prompt for Seedance 2.0, combining an initial image prompt for scene setup with a detailed video motion prompt describing a high-intensity, one-take action sequence of a tactical courier freefalling through a neon megacity, using a magnetic tether, and landing on a cargo tram.

video:video.video:title: Surreal Geometric City Walk in Pablo Picasso Style
video:video.video:description: A detailed video prompt for Seedance 2.0, instructing a side tracking shot of a man walking through a surreal geometric city in the style of Pablo Picasso. The scene includes a cut to a back shot where the man turns and enters a maze-like alley.

video:video.video:title: Female Character Armor Assembly and Flight
video:video.video:description: A two-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing a powerful female character's futuristic armor assembly sequence mid-air above clouds (Shot 1), followed by her accelerating flight through the twilight sky (Shot 2), focusing on mechanical precision, lighting, and realistic physics.

video:video.video:title: Furious Giant Dragon Emerging from Ocean
video:video.video:description: A prompt comparing the output of Kling 3.0 and Seedance 2.0, describing a dynamic shot of a furious giant red dragon emerging from the ocean and flying above a ship, splashing through great waves during a storm.

video:video.video:title: Ramadan to Eid Infinity Zoom Hyperlapse
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, two-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second seamless infinity zoom hyperlapse video in the style of detailed paper-cut art, capturing the journey and key moments of the Ramadan to Eid celebration.

video:video.video:title: Gugu Gaga Chibi Anime Reaction
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an ultra-cute 3D chibi anime animation of the character 'Gugu Gaga' in a penguin kigurumi, focusing on her exaggerated reaction to biting a lemon slice and subsequent cute recovery bounce, specified for vertical TikTok format.

video:video.video:title: Warehouse Breach to Rooftop Inferno Cinematic Script
video:video.video:description: A highly structured, multi-shot prompt/script for Seedance 2.0 detailing a 15-second first-person action sequence, including specific camera work, scene transitions, and action choreography, moving from a warehouse breach to a rooftop explosion.

video:video.video:title: One-Shot War Disaster Film Sequence
video:video.video:description: A detailed Chinese prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic, one-take (one-shot) war disaster sequence. The scene follows a young messenger running through trenches, explosions, and debris, culminating in him reaching a ruined bell tower to fire a signal flare, providing an immersive, realistic war scale.

video:video.video:title: Hyper-Realistic Football Strike Sequence
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a 15-second hyper-realistic sports cinematography sequence of a footballer striking a ball, including film style, core soundtrack, a 9-scene narrative script architecture, technical parameters, and audio architecture.

video:video.video:title: Master Prompts on Vadoo AI
video:video.video:description: This tweet introduces a video generation series focusing on mastering Seedance 2.0 prompts, using a cinematic scenario of a space station collapse as an example.

video:video.video:title: Fast Seedance 2.0 Prompt for a Miniature Dragon
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a video of a miniature, iridescent dragon with glowing eyes, clinging to a pair of dark grey sweatpants, and spitting a massive, screen-filling stream of fire. The prompt specifies high quality, 8K UHD, cinematic lighting, precise positioning matching a reference image, smooth 24fps dynamic motion, and no shaking or frame skipping. The reference image is mentioned to be in the comments.

video:video.video:title: The Office Dragon
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a humorous, photorealistic scene of a dragon flying through a busy cubicle office and firing an employee.

video:video.video:title: Chibi Moe Anime Penguin Girl
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a vertical, high-quality 3D chibi moe anime short video featuring an adorable penguin girl character named 'Aunt Gaga' in a cozy bedroom setting, complete with scene architecture and technical parameters.

video:video.video:title: CatFu Dojo Fight Scene
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a martial arts scene featuring cats inside a traditional dojo.

video:video.video:title: Realistic Nightclub Short Video with Face Consistency
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a 15-second, 9:16 aspect ratio, high-definition, realistic short video set in a nightclub. The video should have the texture of a close-up vertical shot taken with a mobile phone. The main character must inherit the facial recognition, face shape, facial feature proportions, hairstyle, skin tone, age, and sweet and playful temperament of the person in image 1, while ignoring the background, clothing, pose, composition, car interior environment, and illustration/anime style of image 1. The prompt explicitly forbids identity drifting, face-blocking effects, illustration style, and excessive beauty filtering/smoothing.

video:video.video:title: King Kong Attack Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic video of King Kong attacking a bridge during a storm. The prompt specifies the subject's appearance (realistic black silverback gorilla), actions (standing up from the sea, roaring, smashing the bridge), scene (stormy harbor bridge), camera movement (low-angle, shaky handheld push-in), and high-quality cinematic style constraints.

video:video.video:title: Epic Dragon Battle Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an epic fantasy video featuring a warrior riding a giant obsidian dragon into a medieval battle. The prompt specifies camera angles, action sequences (high-speed spiral descent, dragon fire), and high-quality cinematic style constraints.

video:video.video:title: Epic Sci-Fi Action Sequence Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an epic 4K video sequence featuring a mechanical warrior woman in an industrial wasteland battling a giant mech. The prompt specifies camera movements, lighting, style references (1980s Hong Kong martial arts films for the second act), and constraints for character consistency and action choreography across three distinct acts.

video:video.video:title: Sweet and Reversing Ancient Romance Short Drama Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, scene-by-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second short drama video with a sweet, contrasting, and strong reversal plot, featuring a cold-faced poison king and a charming female蛊医 (Gu doctor) who plants a 'heart Gu' on him.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Mecha Transformation Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-frame prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a realistic, cinematic video of a special forces operative performing a high-altitude jump and transforming into an 80-meter tall heavy mecha. The prompt specifies the visual style (IMAX, Hollywood orange-teal, heavy industrial aesthetic), character details, environment (stormy high-altitude sea), camera movements (handheld, follow, low-angle), and the precise sequence of the mecha assembly and final dramatic landing.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Global Female General Armor Transformation Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video featuring 10 different female generals from various cultures (Chinese, Japanese, European, Roman, Viking, Persian, Mongolian, Indian, Arabian, Spartan, and Fantasy Queen) undergoing rapid armor transformations (cosplay/dress-up) in a 12-second sequence. The prompt specifies the visual style, armor details, weapons, actions, and particle effects for each 1-second segment, emphasizing a high-end, realistic, and shocking visual style.

video:video.video:title: Dramatic mountain range eagle dive sequence for Seedance 2
video:video.video:description: A detailed video generation prompt for Seedance 2, instructing the creation of a 15-second sequence from the perspective of a giant golden eagle diving through a dramatic mountain range at sunrise, focusing on spatial consistency, feather physics, and cinematic camera movements.

video:video.video:title: Cyberpunk Motorcycle POV Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a photorealistic, first-person point-of-view video from a speeding motorcycle racing through a neon-lit, futuristic mountain city at sunset. The prompt specifies cyberpunk elements, dynamic camera effects, and high cinematic quality.

video:video.video:title: Motivated Continuous Camera Movement in Medieval Market Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt designed to generate a continuous, single-shot video with 'motivated camera movement' through a crowded medieval market. The prompt specifies time-coded sequences where the camera's focus shifts naturally from one moving subject to the next, ending on an armored knight inside a tavern.

video:video.video:title: Epic Superhero Transformation and Dragon Fight Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly structured Seedance 2.0 prompt for an epic, cinematic action sequence involving a terrified girl transforming into a celestial warrior while fighting a massive dragon in a burning modern city. The prompt details the scene, action, transformation, camera work (IMAX destruction shot), lighting, and style (ultra realistic, Avengers-level destruction).

video:video.video:title: Celestial Goddess Manifestation at the White House Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing a high-stakes VFX scene set at the White House. A defiant woman manifests a massive, glowing celestial goddess while UFOs descend and secret service agents panic. The prompt emphasizes epic scale and 8k resolution.

video:video.video:title: Large-Scale Architectural Transformation and Destruction Physics Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A complex Seedance 2.0 prompt focused on simulating advanced physics, destruction, and large-scale architectural transformation. The scene features a figure with a glowing mantle causing the urban landscape to reconfigure and dissolve into a vast, circular void, emphasizing realistic mass and coherence in the debris and structural changes.

video:video.video:title: Viral Pixar-Style Turkish Ice Cream Trick Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-cut video prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a highly viral, comedic Pixar-style animation of a figure attempting to get ice cream from a trickster vendor. The prompt specifies timing, camera movements (35mm/50mm), sound effects (SFX), and a six-beat structure for maximum engagement.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Duel: Wolverine vs. Hulk
video:video.video:description: A high-detail, cinematic action sequence prompt for Seedance 2.0 depicting a brutal fight between Wolverine (resembling Hugh Jackman) and the Hulk in a misty pine forest. The prompt specifies character details (photorealistic CGI, detailed skin/veins), atmosphere (moody, desaturated), camera work (handheld shaky-cam, low-angle, slow-motion), and specific actions (claw slash, throat grab).

video:video.video:title: One-Shot Continuous Fall Through Four Layers of Reality
video:video.video:description: A highly complex, multi-lingual prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a continuous, one-shot video of a young man falling through four distinct, escalating layers of reality (future city, primeval forest, alien canyons, cosmic platform) after opening a spacetime rift. The prompt details the action, environment of each layer, camera movement (continuous falling sensation), and the escalating spectacle.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Hyper-Realism: Silver BMW i8
video:video.video:description: A detailed video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on cinematic hyper-realism. The scene features a silver BMW i8 in a modern urban environment. The prompt specifies camera settings (medium-wide, handheld, DSLR 50mm lens), lighting (overcast sky), and action (butterfly doors slowly closing while the camera gently moves and circles the vehicle).

video:video.video:title: Vibrant Orange Soda Commercial Shot
video:video.video:description: A concise prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a high-detail commercial shot of a vibrant orange soda can. The prompt emphasizes slow motion, splashing citrus slices, sparkling water droplets, and bright, energetic lighting.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Martial Arts Duel: Boar vs. Rooster in Minecraft Style
video:video.video:description: A detailed video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, creating a cinematic martial arts duel between anthropomorphic characters (a boar and a rooster) set in a vibrant, blocky, Minecraft-inspired 3D environment. The prompt specifies character details, action choreography, environment style, lighting, VFX, and dynamic camera work, aiming for a high-quality 3D animation aesthetic similar to 'Clash of Clans' or 'Kung Fu Panda'.

video:video.video:title: Continuous One-Take Disaster Film Realism
video:video.video:description: A complex, multi-stage video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a continuous, one-take shot in the style of a disaster film with hyperreal water physics. The camera follows an emergency technician sprinting and leaping across a flooded, collapsing European capital, culminating in a giant wave crash. The prompt specifies detailed action, environment, camera movement, and a cold, apocalyptic color palette.

video:video.video:title: Ultra-realistic First-Person Zombie Survival Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, structured prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate an ultra-realistic, first-person POV zombie survival action scene, inspired by biohazard-style games. The prompt specifies camera movement, character actions, enemy behavior, environment details, lighting, pacing, and visual effects for cinematic quality.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: News Report and Action Scene
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed and complex prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video with two distinct parts: a professional news report segment and a gritty, found-footage style action sequence featuring a female protagonist fighting zombies. The prompt specifies detailed visual aesthetics, camera work (handheld shake, motion blur), sound design (sirens, radio static, rough field audio), and a specific narrative structure, aiming for a low-fidelity, old-school CRT monitor look with VHS noise and artifacts.

video:video.video:title: Spring Outing Vlog Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a fresh, cinematic spring outing vlog featuring a young woman in a rapeseed flower field. The prompt specifies the subject's appearance, actions, scene details, lighting (golden soft side/backlight), and camera movement (slow 45-degree arc push-in).

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 prompt for high-viral comedic payoff video
video:video.video:description: A specific, detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 video generation, outlining format specifications (15s, multi-cut, 6 beats, high-viral comedic payoff) and detailed descriptions of two subjects: a small, cartoonishly exaggerated figure and a tall ice cream vendor.

video:video.video:title: Woman applying makeup invaded by mud-like liquid
video:video.video:description: A detailed narrative prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a woman applying makeup who is interrupted by a mud-like liquid flooding her room. The scene escalates as she climbs onto a chair, is forced to float, and eventually hits the ceiling, which opens to reveal sunlight.

video:video.video:title: Godzilla-Sized White Tabby Cat in Chongqing
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot Seedance 2.0 prompt for a 15-second mockumentary-style video featuring a Godzilla-sized white tabby cat stuck between skyscrapers in a busy city like Chongqing, including specific actions, details, and a memetic ending.

video:video.video:title: Dough Kneading Physics Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt designed to test Seedance 2.0's ability to render realistic physics and motion, describing the process of preparing dough, including sprinkling salt, stirring, pouring water, cracking an egg, and kneading.

video:video.video:title: Dark Fantasy/Horror Narrative Prompt
video:video.video:description: A long, highly descriptive narrative prompt focusing on a dark, cold, and stormy scene in a forest, emphasizing sensory details like the wind, lashing snow, trembling torchlight, and the 'wrong-cold' feeling of mail armor. This prompt aims for a cinematic, atmospheric video generation.

video:video.video:title: Video Generation Prompt with Image References
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a video scene using Seedance 2.0. It specifies using Image 1 as the starting frame, dictates camera movement (rotation and push-in), and requires the character's facial features to be based on Image 2, culminating in a loud, comedic roar.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Street Dance Video Generation
video:video.video:description: A prompt used to generate a 15-second street dance video, created in one go using a single selfie as a reference image and a text prompt.

video:video.video:title: Ancient Costume Time-Travel Drama Trailer Generation
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a short trailer for an ancient costume time-travel drama. The prompt specifies character actions, dialogue, scene transitions (modern gym to ancient house), camera movements, and final title card, requiring the use of a reference image for the main character's appearance.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Zhen Huan & Consort Hua Talk Show
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene video generation prompt for ByteDance's Seedance 2.0, creating a 10-second cross-genre video featuring characters from the Qing Dynasty drama 'Empresses in the Palace' performing a modern talk show in the style of the Chinese New Year Gala (Chunwan). The prompt specifies camera shots, character actions, dialogue, costume details, and stylistic contrasts.

video:video.video:title: Video prompt for a tavern fight scene
video:video.video:description: This is a detailed video generation prompt for creating a dynamic fight scene in a tavern, focusing on a woman in black fighting assassins. The prompt specifies using the beginning and ending frames as reference points, requiring smooth transitions, shot composition, and different camera angles to achieve a rhythmic and cinematic feel.

video:video.video:title: Hollywood Racing Movie Scene Generation
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed to generate a high-stakes, cinematic night racing scene in the style of a Hollywood professional racing movie (Le Mans style), featuring two drivers: The Veteran and The Challenger.

video:video.video:title: Emotional Breakdown Scene with Image and Video References
video:video.video:description: A complex prompt utilizing multiple references: an image for the character, an image for the pose, and a video for the action, emotions, and facial expressions during a dramatic breakdown and scream scene.

video:video.video:title: First-Person Roller Coaster with Seasonal Transitions
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a continuous, first-person perspective roller coaster ride that seamlessly transitions through four different seasonal scenes, demonstrating Seedance 2.0's ability to handle complex scene transitions and continuous shots.

video:video.video:title: Watercolor Ink Sword Performance
video:video.video:description: A prompt used to generate a breathtaking sword performance rendered in a watercolor ink style, demonstrating the model's ability to handle complex action and artistic styles from a single instruction.

video:video.video:title: Restaurant Review Video Generation
video:video.video:description: A prompt instructing Seedance 2.0 to generate a restaurant review video based on an uploaded menu, showcasing the model's ability to synthesize information from external documents into a structured video format.

video:video.video:title: Model Posing with Multiple Outfits
video:video.video:description: This is an image generation prompt designed to create a series of poses for a model, utilizing several reference images for different outfits and a single reference image for the facial features. The model is instructed to strike various playful, cool, cute, surprised, and handsome poses while wearing the specified outfits.

video:video.video:title: Fantasy Martial Arts Fight Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed Chinese prompt for generating a fantasy martial arts fight scene between two girls on top of a building, mimicking the style, special effects, and dialogue of a Xuanhuan (fantasy wuxia) TV series, concluding with the girl in white winning.

video:video.video:title: Man Fleeing Police in Urban Chase Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a dynamic video sequence. It describes a man in a black jacket running desperately down an urban street, fleeing a blurred, surging crowd of police and civilians. The camera is specified as a low-angle following shot, keeping the man centered for a frantic, action-packed scene.

video:video.video:title: Skiing Video Generation Prompt with Detailed Scene Breakdown
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, scene-by-scene prompt for generating a 15-second skiing video using Seedance 2.0. The prompt specifies the overall style (bright, energetic, cinematic), camera movements, shot types (close-up, medium shot, overhead), actions, and emotional tone across five distinct time segments, focusing on speed, rhythm, and dynamic movement. This prompt requires a reference image of the main character.

video:video.video:title: 90s Anime Action Sequence: Cafe Ambush
video:video.video:description: A complex prompt designed to generate an action sequence in a 90s anime style. It features a woman in a black evening dress sitting peacefully in a cafe who is suddenly ambushed by masked gunmen. The sequence details her immediate reaction of flipping a table for cover.

video:video.video:title: Storyboarding and Multi-Perspective Video Generation
video:video.video:description: A general instruction for creating a short film using Seedance 2.0, emphasizing the use of storyboards and switching between different perspectives to enhance rhythm and cinematic quality. This is a high-level instruction rather than a specific scene prompt.

video:video.video:title: Surrealist Megalophobia Sci-Fi Reveal Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, time-segmented prompt for a 15-second surrealist, megalophobia-themed sci-fi video. The scene starts with a peaceful sky that is then unzipped by a giant hand, revealing a cyberpunk future or a giant mechanical eye, ultimately showing the world is a miniature ecosystem observed by a giant.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Action Movie Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a cinematic action sequence featuring a female warrior in a derelict industrial setting, emphasizing a continuous long take, high-tech tactical gear, and dynamic combat against zombies.

video:video.video:title: Comic to Video Explanation Prompt (Journey to the West)
video:video.video:description: A prompt to convert a comic image into an explanatory video using a popular science style and voiceover, detailing the story of Sun Wukong borrowing the Banana Fan from Princess Iron Fan, her refusal due to the conflict involving her son Red Boy, and the ensuing argument.

video:video.video:title: Moonlit Bamboo Forest Swordsman Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a cinematic video sequence featuring a swordsman in a moonlit bamboo forest. The prompt specifies camera movements (360-degree rotation, long take push-in), action sequences (drawing the sword, cutting bamboo with a sword energy), and environmental sound effects, aiming for a dramatic martial arts film style.

video:video.video:title: Comic to Video Adaptation Prompt (Journey to the West)
video:video.video:description: A prompt for adapting a comic strip into a video, maintaining the dialogue and sequence of the original images, adding special sound effects for scene transitions and key plot points, and adopting a humorous style based on a reference video.

video:video.video:title: Eastern Wuxia Ultimate Showdown with Extreme Kinetic Energy
video:video.video:description: A detailed, three-scene prompt for a 15-second video depicting an ultimate Eastern Wuxia duel between a master in white and a master in black. It specifies 'Extreme Kinetic Energy,' 'Environmental Destruction Aesthetics,' fast-paced editing, cinematic particle effects, and an epic soundtrack, detailing the collision, mid-air combat, and a final energy blast climax.

video:video.video:title: Hollywood Sci-Fi Cyberpunk Chase Scene
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, three-shot prompt for a 10-second video simulating a Hollywood Sci-Fi Blockbuster with Cyberpunk Aesthetics. It specifies camera techniques (wide-angle tracking, tight action shot, epic pull-back), environment (rainy megacity, neon lights, holographic ads), and technical parameters (8k UHD, Teal & Orange grading, HDR, complex particle effects) focusing on a high-speed anti-gravity vehicle chase.

video:video.video:title: Wong Kar-wai Style Melancholy Phone Booth Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed, three-shot prompt for a 10-second video mimicking the style of 90s Hong Kong Art Cinema (Wong Kar-wai). It specifies visual elements (retro film grain, yellow-green tint, step-printing/slow shutter drag), a key line of dialogue, and camera techniques (peeking through glass, extreme close-up, handheld feel) to convey intense loneliness and suppressed emotion in a rainy phone booth scene.

video:video.video:title: Tang Bohu E-Sports Showdown (Spring Festival Gala Style)
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, 10-second prompt for a video blending Ming Dynasty scholar aesthetics with modern e-sports, set on a grand Spring Festival Gala stage. The script specifies character attire (Ming Dynasty robes + LED gaming headset), environment (red/gold festive lighting, RGB keyboard, ink-wash MOBA game), dynamic camera movements (push-in, ECU), and dialogue, creating an absurd, high-contrast scene.

video:video.video:title: Classical Wuxia Duel in Bamboo Forest
video:video.video:description: A prompt for a 10-second video generating a classical Eastern Wuxia scene in a bamboo forest. It specifies the aesthetic (emerald green, cinematic lighting, soft light beams), defines two characters (male in white, female in cyan), and details three shots: a wide shot establishing the scene with light movements, a slow-motion mid-shot of swords clashing, and a dynamic tracking shot emphasizing speed and flowing bamboo leaves.

video:video.video:title: King Hu Style Wuxia Film Aesthetic Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a 10-second video in the style of director King Hu, focusing on Wuxia film aesthetics, 70s film grain, Peking Opera movements, Zen philosophy, and the use of negative space. The prompt specifies the video duration and the first shot as an extreme wide shot.

video:video.video:title: Anime character battle generation examples
video:video.video:description: This tweet suggests the use of Seedance 2.0 to generate fan-favorite anime battles, specifically mentioning Gojo vs Naruto and Saitama vs Genos, implying the model handles complex character interactions and styles.

video:video.video:title: Cyberpunk Allegory of AI Captivity (Multi-Shot Prompt)
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt designed to generate a 15-second cyberpunk-style video using Seedance 2.0. The video is structured in three acts (Freedom, Captivity, Despair) and uses the metaphor of a digital whale being caged to represent the restriction of AI capabilities.

video:video.video:title: Action Movie Plane Scene
video:video.video:description: A quick test prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a fast-paced action movie scene involving a woman taking control of a plane after the pilots disappear.

video:video.video:title: MAX POWER Desert Storm Action Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed to generate an epic, gritty, Denis Villeneuve-style desert action scene with a colossal sandstorm and a military convoy, focusing on scale, panic, and climax.

video:video.video:title: Fishing Scene Quality Test
video:video.video:description: A test of Seedance 2.0 using a fishing scene prompt, noting the high quality but observing inconsistencies in objects outside the training data (e.g., a 'tuna whale' fish and a man resembling Tom Hanks).

video:video.video:title: Olympic Gymnastics Beam Final
video:video.video:description: A prompt designed to generate a photorealistic shot of a US gymnast performing a back handspring and landing firmly on the beam during the women's beam final at the Olympics, with commentators reacting excitedly.

video:video.video:title: Olympic Snowboard Big Air Competition
video:video.video:description: A prompt used to generate a photorealistic video of a US snowboarder during the Olympic Big Air competition, racing down the hill and flying off the ramp, with excited commentary.

video:video.video:title: Cyberpunk Cinematic Scene Generation
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a 15-second cyberpunk cinematic video featuring a memory hunter hacker in a black trench coat within a neon-lit digital space, emphasizing a Ghost in the Shell aesthetic with purple and blue neon glow, shattered holographic memory fragments, and dialogue.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Text-to-Video Prompt Example
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a 15-second pseudo-documentary style video (Vlog Style) with hyperrealism, fixed camera position, natural lighting, and a touch of suspenseful comedy, featuring an ordinary young woman.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Text-to-Video Prompt: Suspense Comedy Mirror Glitch
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a 15-second suspense comedy scene in a pseudo-documentary style. The scene features a young woman in a bathroom whose reflection in the mirror exhibits independent, glitching consciousness after she turns away.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Godzilla-Sized Orange Cat in Chongqing
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0, designed to create a meme-style pseudo-documentary featuring a gigantic, Godzilla-sized orange tabby cat stuck between skyscrapers in a magical 8D city like Chongqing.

video:video.video:title: Ancient Costume Power Struggle Short Drama Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for generating a 15-second short drama in the style of an ancient costume power struggle, focusing on the conflict between a true and a fake daughter. The prompt includes specific character descriptions, scene settings, actions, and dialogue lip-sync instructions segmented by time.

video:video.video:title: Dramatic Scene Generation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a dramatic scene set at a top-tier charity gala, involving a pianist's daughter and a disfigured woman on a wheelchair who exposes her as an imposter. The prompt specifies the scene, motivation, and a constraint on the appearance of the characters.

video:video.video:title: Epic Ice and Fire Disaster Action Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an epic disaster action film trailer featuring two elemental characters, the Magma Admiral and the Ice General, battling in an extreme environment of volcanoes and glaciers. The prompt specifies style, duration, scene descriptions, character details, and camera work.

video:video.video:title: Movie Scene Prompt with Reference Images and Technical Specs
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a movie scene involving a male and female protagonist, set at a Hong Kong football stadium during a Liverpool match, focusing on a moment of secret plotting involving the player Van Dijk. The prompt includes placeholders for reference images, a scene description, technical specifications (mid-shot, eye-level, shallow depth of field), and an emotional context.

video:video.video:title: Eastern Classical Immortal Heroine Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a 15-second video in the style of Eastern classical Xianxia (immortal hero) aesthetics. The prompt specifies cinematic quality, fluid cloth simulation, glowing particle effects, and focuses on a beautiful fairy performing a dance on a floating island above the clouds, emphasizing the movement of her white silk ribbons and sleeves.

video:video.video:title: Martial Arts Fight Scene Generation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt instructing the AI to generate a fluid fight scene between a female martial artist and several bandits, based on provided start and end frames of a tavern fight. It requires the use of storyboarding and different perspective switches to achieve a rhythmic and cinematic feel.

video:video.video:title: Van Gogh Post-Impressionism Abstract Animation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second abstract animation in the style of Van Gogh's Post-Impressionism. It emphasizes heavy impasto texture, swirling brushstrokes, high-saturation blue and yellow contrast, depicting a dynamic world where the sky and landscape are constantly flowing and 'breathing' with the movement of the thick oil paint.

video:video.video:title: Viral CEO Drama: The Dragon King Reveal Prompt
video:video.video:description: A text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second vertical short drama in the style of a viral Chinese 'Godly CEO' revenge story. The scene involves a groom being humiliated by his future mother-in-law at a wedding, only for him to reveal his true identity as the 'Dragon King' (a powerful, hidden billionaire) in a dramatic, high-contrast sequence.

video:video.video:title: Viral Short Drama: Heartbreak and Rain Prompt
video:video.video:description: A text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second vertical short drama in the style of a viral Chinese melodrama. The scene is a rainy night street where the male protagonist desperately chases the female protagonist, 'Yanzi,' as she leaves in a luxury car, culminating in his iconic, despairing cry and collapse on the wet asphalt.

video:video.video:title: Mini-Drama: Rainy Night Breakup and Reunion Prompt
video:video.video:description: A text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second mini-drama featuring high-contrast visuals and rapid cuts. The scene is a beautiful, heart-wrenching breakup in the rain between a passionate CEO male lead and a stubborn, fragile female lead, culminating in a dramatic reveal (a ring or report) and a passionate embrace.

video:video.video:title: Epic Sci-Fi Scene Prompt: Robot on Mountain Peak
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating an epic sci-fi scene using a wide-angle cinematic lens. The scene features a solitary robot standing on a high mountain peak on Earth, facing the distant sky.
