video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a cyberpunk-style CGI scene featuring a young assassin fighting enemies in a run-down city corner, with a dynamic camera pull-back revealing the assassin surrounded.

video:video.video:title: Demon Slayer Live-Action Manga Adaptation Prompt
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-shot prompt for generating a 15-second live-action adaptation of a Demon Slayer-style final battle, specifying characters, VFX (Water Breathing vs. Thunder Breathing), camera cuts, style, duration, and scene progression.

video:video.video:title: Whip Pan Dialogue Argument Scene
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, technical prompt for a 15-second continuous shot of an argument between a man and a woman in an apartment. The prompt specifies dialogue, timing, camera movement (whip pans following the speaker), sound layers, and an emotional climax ending on a confused golden retriever puppy.

video:video.video:title: Multi-Shot Laboratory Drink Commercial
video:video.video:description: A complex, multi-shot prompt detailing an 8-shot sequence for a commercial. It follows a man examining a bottle in a lab, pouring a drink, consuming it, and then transitioning to a dynamic music festival scene, ending with a direct address to the camera with lip-syncing.

video:video.video:title: AI Dojo Fight Scene with Dimensional Style Shifts
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating an AI dojo fight scene where every impact causes a shift in the visual style, transitioning between different dimensions like ink, anime, neon, and glitch.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Baby Dragon and Potter in Volcanic Cave
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a scene in a volcanic cave where a human potter and a baby dragon interact, culminating in the dragon accidentally destroying the potter's work with an uncontrolled sneeze of fire. The prompt includes specific visual styles, camera movements, and scene beats.

video:video.video:title: Female Ninja Fight Scene
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating an intense, high-action sword fight scene featuring a female ninja in a dark cinematic alley, emphasizing dynamic camera movement and dramatic lighting.

video:video.video:title: Indonesian Man Fight Scene
video:video.video:description: A simple prompt for generating an action scene featuring an overweight Indonesian man fighting and defeating multiple enemies armed with machetes in a hotel hallway.

video:video.video:title: Sports Car Transformer Sequence
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a 10-second dynamic video showing a modern sports car transforming into a tall, handsome humanoid mecha, emphasizing metallic textures, cinematic lighting, and sound effects.

video:video.video:title: Character Replacement and Consistency
video:video.video:description: A complex prompt instructing Seedance 2.0 to replace a character in an existing video with a basketball player from a reference image, ensuring consistent body proportions, facial features, and athletic build throughout the sequence, while maintaining complex camera moves.

video:video.video:title: Anime Girl Parkour Escape in Neon Night City
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a dynamic video sequence featuring an anime girl performing parkour to escape black agents across neon-lit city rooftops, emphasizing cel-shading, low-angle tracking, and realistic physics.

video:video.video:title: Shot Horror Sequence (Kling 3.0)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for generating a 13-second POV horror sequence set in an abandoned hallway, featuring a rocking horse that multiplies and a final jump scare with a distorted wooden mask. This prompt is explicitly for Kling 3.0, not Seedance 2.0, but is included as a complex video generation example.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic War Footage Style Guide (Part 1)
video:video.video:description: The first part of a detailed style guide for generating cinematic, realistic war footage set in a modern Middle Eastern desert village, focusing on color palette, lighting, and atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Nine-Panel Grid Interactive Animation
video:video.video:description: A complex, 12-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to animate a nine-panel grid composition where the characters in each panel start interacting, pushing, and distorting the grid lines, transitioning from static poses to chaotic, cross-panel activity.

video:video.video:title: Transformer Transformation Cinematic Sequence
video:video.video:description: A detailed, four-scene cinematic prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a complex transformation sequence of a muscle car into a giant mechanical titan, focusing on dynamic camera work, detailed mechanical actions, and an apocalyptic aesthetic. This prompt is structured with specific time stamps for each scene.

video:video.video:title: Chinese New Year 'Get Rich Immediately' Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for generating a 15-second vertical video celebrating Chinese New Year and wishing for wealth. The prompt uses a reference image for the first frame and includes specific scene descriptions, character dialogue (with lip-sync priority), sound effects, camera movements, and visual style (cinematic warm tone, light particles, fireworks).

video:video.video:title: Recursive Horror Jump-Scare Prompt
video:video.video:description: An extremely long and detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a psychological horror scene with a recursive loop effect, focusing on first-person POV, VHS aesthetic, and mounting dread rather than a cheap jump scare. The prompt specifies camera movements, sound design, and the appearance of a translucent ghost in security footage that mirrors reality.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Crane Shot Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-cut prompt designed for image-to-video generation, describing a romantic scene involving a couple and a glowing castle in the mist, utilizing specific camera movements like a wide crane shot, slow push-in, and whip-pan.

video:video.video:title: Photorealistic Superhero Cat Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt used with Seedance Pro 2.0 to generate a photorealistic video of a superhero cat jumping from a skyscraper at night.

video:video.video:title: Reaper Horn Echoes Across a Desolate Planet
video:video.video:description: A prompt used with the Grok Imagine video model (mentioned alongside Seedance 2.0) to generate a video of Reapers landing on an apocalyptic, desolate planet.

video:video.video:title: Girl's Transformation into Hanfu with Silver-Blue Theme
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-step prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a girl's transformation video. It starts with her in plain clothes applying paint, which turns silver-blue, followed by a scene change where she appears in exquisite Hanfu, featuring specific lighting, texture, and emotional atmosphere (decadent and lazy temperament).

video:video.video:title: Futuristic Hovercraft on Savanna Hardpack
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, long prompt for generating a 10-second continuous shot video of a futuristic hovercraft speeding across a savanna, including specific camera movements (aerial orbit, swoop, top-down lock, side chase, close spiral) and environmental details (dust devils, storm line, termite mounds). This prompt was used with Kling 2.6, not Seedance 2.0, but is included as context for advanced video generation prompts.

video:video.video:title: Sakura Gaiden Cinematic Evolution
video:video.video:description: A prompt titled 'Sakura Gaiden' used to generate a cinematic video, showcasing Seedance 2.0's ability to quickly turn imagination into footage.

video:video.video:title: First-Person POV Battlefield Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a chaotic and intense first-person perspective battlefield scene, emphasizing the claustrophobic atmosphere within a knight's helmet during dusk.

video:video.video:title: Two-line prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: The user generated a video using a very short, two-line prompt in Seedance 2.0, suggesting the model is highly capable even with minimal instruction.

video:video.video:title: Eastern High-Fantasy Daoist Aesthetics Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene video prompt for Seedance 2.0, focusing on Eastern High-Fantasy Daoist Aesthetics, specifically the concept of 'Tai Chi Circulation and the Return of All Laws'. The prompt specifies cinematic particle CG, fluid light effects, and a script with camera movements and actions across a 12-second sequence, emphasizing the visual themes of Yin-Yang, runes, and auspicious energy.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Rescue Montage Storyboard Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 instructing the creation of a cinematic rescue montage based on a 9-panel storyboard, specifying pacing, camera movement, and timing for different sections.

video:video.video:title: Live-Action Style Dancing Girl Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a live-action style video of a beautiful girl dancing to a DJ track. The prompt specifies the girl's appearance, clothing, dance moves, synchronization with music, camera work (push/pull), lighting, background, aspect ratio (9:16), duration (10s), and a list of negative prompts to ensure high quality.

video:video.video:title: Friends Group Selfie Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A complex, multi-character, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a humorous and chaotic group selfie video among friends. The prompt uses three reference images (Figure 1, 2, 3) for the characters, specifies dialogue, camera movements, timing, and visual style (bright, natural light, handheld shake, 35mm film texture, vertical screen).

video:video.video:title: Anime 'Fa Tian Xiang Di' Transformation Effect Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a cinematic CG video sequence depicting an anime character performing the 'Fa Tian Xiang Di' (Heaven and Earth Law) technique, featuring intense visual effects like purple lightning, golden light bursts, and the appearance of a giant translucent spirit form.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Sensual Dance Video
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a 9:16 video using Seedance 2.0, featuring a beautiful girl with long black wavy hair, wearing a pink crop top and yoga pants, dancing sensually to Future House DJ music. The prompt specifies dance moves (playful hip swings, arm waves, fixed poses) synchronized with the beat, camera movement (push/pull tracking with the beat), background (bedroom), lighting (soft spotlights from above), and exclusions (blur, low resolution, noise, watermarks, etc.).

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Dark Sci-Fi Transformation Video
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a transformation video (likely using Seedance 2.0, given the context of other tweets) where the subject's face remains consistent. The desired style is realistic, dark, bio-tech/alien sci-fi, and oppressive, referencing 'Kamen Rider BLACK SUN'. The prompt specifies the pre-transformation outfit (black leather trench coat, black shirt, bangs covering the forehead), the belt (alien energy core, non-toy-like), and the scene (overcast outdoor empty lot, grey-blue sky, windy).

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Duel with Dynamic Camera Movement
video:video.video:description: A simple prompt used in Seedance Pro 2.0 to generate a cinematic video featuring a duel, emphasizing dynamic camera work and dramatic slow-motion effects during key action moments.

video:video.video:title: Multi-Shot Storyboard Prompt for Cartoon Generation
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed to generate a short cartoon sequence depicting a man getting into a car and driving wildly, including specific camera and action cues.

video:video.video:title: Storyboard to Anime Conversion Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt used in Seedance 2.0 to convert an uploaded storyboard reference image into a colored anime animation.

video:video.video:title: Giant Preserved Sea Creatures Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt used in Seedance 2.0 (via Dreamina AI) to generate a scene of tiny scientists viewing giant preserved sea creatures like a megalodon and octopus in tanks.

video:video.video:title: Mermaid to Dragonfly Transformation Cinematic Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a dramatic, ultra-realistic transformation of a mermaid bursting from the ocean into a hyper-detailed dragonfly, complete with specific camera movements and lighting instructions.

video:video.video:title: 1995 Independent Wrestling Event Prompt
video:video.video:description: A specific prompt for Seedance 2.0 requesting a single camcorder shot of an independent professional wrestling event taking place inside a barn in Kentucky in 1995.

video:video.video:title: Androgenic Revenge Plot Prompt
video:video.video:description: A short, dramatic prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on a character named Androgenic plotting revenge after a humiliating event (getting their wig snatched), with an instruction to generate a video that evokes high stress (cortisol spike).

video:video.video:title: High in the rugged 1975 Ladakh mountains, Indian engineers harness newly discovered anti-gravity minerals nicknamed “Shakti Stones.”
video:video.video:description: A detailed narrative prompt for a cinematic scene set in the 1975 Ladakh mountains, focusing on Indian engineers using newly discovered anti-gravity minerals to construct floating vessels that fuse Himalayan architecture with advanced levitation technology. The scene includes pilgrims, UFO spotters, quantum physicists, and a line of silent monks, blending spiritual and mechanical anticipation.

video:video.video:title: Epic fantasy scene with intense color shifts and atmosphere of oppression
video:video.video:description: A structured prompt for generating an epic fantasy scene, specifying an intense color palette shift between icy blue and blazing red, and an atmosphere conveying oppression, fatalism, and cinematic reversal. It also begins to define a character as a small silhouette viewed from behind.

video:video.video:title: Deep ocean trench scene with a peaceful giant
video:video.video:description: A cinematic prompt for a deep ocean trench scene, utilizing quick cuts and emphasizing an awe-inspiring, primeval atmosphere. The focus is on a peaceful giant moving flawlessly through the quiet water, evoking majesty and the raw power of nature.

video:video.video:title: High-Speed Battle Anime OP Style Video Generation (Fixed Characters)
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt designed to generate a high-speed battle anime opening sequence featuring a fixed set of 8 characters (based on input images) rapidly appearing and performing special moves against a blue sky background. This prompt is for maintaining character consistency.

video:video.video:title: UGC video of a girl demonstrating stockings in a dressing room
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a User-Generated Content (UGC) video featuring a girl around 20 years old introducing and demonstrating how to wear a pair of stockings inside a dressing room.

video:video.video:title: Pinball Machine God Hand Cinematic Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly creative and surreal cinematic prompt for video generation, describing a scene where a woman is used as a pinball by a giant 'god's hand,' ending with a high-five.

video:video.video:title: Kling 3.0 Antarctic Station Sci-Fi Horror Prompt
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed cinematic prompt for Kling 3.0, describing a tense sci-fi horror scene in an Antarctic station where a radio operator discovers a massive entity cracking the ice shelf. Includes specific VFX, aesthetic, and color palette instructions (John Carpenter isolation palette).

video:video.video:title: Kling 3.0 Art Gallery Horror Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Kling 3.0 Pro, creating a short horror scene set in a dimly lit art gallery where a portrait comes to life and silences a security guard. Includes specific instructions for camera movement, texture, and audio.

video:video.video:title: Magic Prompt for Coherent Scene Generation
video:video.video:description: A 'magic prompt' designed to generate a sequence of nine coherent scenes based on previously provided image and video references, ensuring consistency in color grading, style, graphics, and characters.

video:video.video:title: Reference Linking Syntax for Video Generation
video:video.video:description: This tweet explains the syntax for linking external references (images and videos) when generating content, specifying how different media types should be used as input for character, visual style, motion, or sound. It provides examples of how to structure these links within the prompt.

video:video.video:title: Earth's Eye Cinematic Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-stage cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a hyper-realistic yet surreal journey from space, free-falling towards Earth, bouncing off landmarks across continents, and forming a giant 'Eye of the Earth' with light arcs.

video:video.video:title: Pure Desire Goddess Transformation Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a high-definition, pure desire (Chun Yu) style beauty transformation short video using Seedance 2.0, focusing on soft lighting, delicate skin texture, and a smooth transition between a lazy home look and a refined goddess look.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Sci-Fi Action Short Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-section prompt designed to generate a 12-second cinematic sci-fi action short video (PG-13) featuring a female agent in a rainy, war-torn cyberpunk city confronting a mechanical hunter. The prompt specifies scene details, timing, camera work, lighting, color palette, and constraints.

video:video.video:title: Casual Snapshot of a Cute Girl in a Messy Bedroom
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt aiming to generate a low-quality, casual snapshot of a beautiful girl in a slightly messy bedroom, emphasizing a 'pure and desirable' idol aesthetic, cold white skin, and an awkward, natural, low-quality iPhone snapshot style.

video:video.video:title: Epic superhero transformation scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an epic transformation scene. It starts with a teenage boy in a dark mystical cave touching a glowing crystal, followed by an intense burst of energy and his transformation into a superhero with a red and blue suit and flowing cape, emphasizing cinematic quality and dramatic effects.

video:video.video:title: Ultra-Realistic Golden Eagle Cinematic Sequence Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-paragraph prompt for Seedance 2.0 requesting an ultra-realistic cinematic sequence of a golden eagle launching from a cliff, navigating an urban environment, and landing on a rooftop sign, emphasizing realism, physics, and camera work.

video:video.video:title: First-Person Dragon Rider Image Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 requesting an ultra-realistic, first-person perspective image of a rider on a massive dragon flying over a besieged ancient city, focusing on the rider's armored hands and the dragon's wings.

video:video.video:title: Action Sequence: Character Launching First Attack
video:video.video:description: A text-based prompt describing a detailed action sequence where a character launches a high kick, flips backward, and sweeps a clone's leg to knock it off balance. This appears to be a script or action description intended for video generation.

video:video.video:title: Transformers/Mission Impossible Hybrid Jet Transformation Prompt
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-act prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a 10-second continuous shot of a pilot climbing a transforming jet in Paris, the jet transforming into a colossal humanoid mech, firing a cannon, folding back into a jet, and rocketing to Shanghai.

video:video.video:title: Surrealist Cinematic Playground Scene
video:video.video:description: A Seedance 2.0 prompt designed to generate a surrealist, cinematic video of an indoor playground scene. It specifies a 16:9 wide aspect ratio, cold fluorescent lighting (cyan-blue and cold purple tones), and a high frame rate for extremely high image quality, with a segmented script starting from 0-4 seconds (medium shot).

video:video.video:title: SnorriCam Photorealism Character Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a photorealistic cinematic scene featuring a young woman. The scene utilizes a SnorriCam rig for absolute center-locked focus and cinema lenses. The environment transitions are designed to be seamless, physically melting and snapping into new environments, synchronized spatially.

video:video.video:title: Hollywood Blockbuster Transformer Scene Prompt (Paris to Shanghai)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, two-part, single-shot (one-take) Seedance 2.0 prompt for a Hollywood-style Transformer scene featuring a pilot in a white suit. The first part describes a high-speed transformation sequence starting in Paris and ending in Shanghai, focusing on the pilot's actions and the mechanical details. It specifies an IMAX wide composition, ultra-realistic CGI, dynamic motion blur, and a cold blue-gray color palette with orange-red engine flames. The prompt includes specific references to images (图片1, 图片2, 图片3) which are likely reference images for the scene elements.

video:video.video:title: Sora 2 Wind Turbine Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a cinematic, large-format photorealistic video using Sora 2. The scene features a rapid circling orbit above a thick cloud sea, focusing on realistic wind turbines with crisp cloud volumetrics, clean motion blur, and specific technical parameters like 2.35:1 aspect ratio, 24fps, 15s duration, and 8K resolution.

video:video.video:title: Higgsfield Cinematic Racing Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A sample prompt for generating a cinematic racing video, 8–12 seconds in duration. The prompt specifies the first shot (0–2 seconds) as an onboard grip shot, rigidly mounted to the race car chassis, using a low, centered nose-mounted camera with a wide-angle lens, matching a reference image's angle and position.

video:video.video:title: Single-Take Horror Sequence Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt that generates a single-take horror sequence where a girl encounters intruders and grabs a shotgun, focusing on building pure tension.

video:video.video:title: Organic Alien Arrival Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a high-energy, visceral scene of an organic alien arrival downtown, featuring quick cuts, beat-synced hard editing (140 BPM, 15 shots), and a high-contrast, tactile dread atmosphere with gargantuan, pulsating organic entities eclipsing the skyline.

video:video.video:title: 10-Second Ancient Chinese Costume Quick Change Video
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, time-coded prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 10-second, high-quality, seamless costume change video (卡点换装) featuring a beautiful girl transitioning through nine different ancient Chinese styles, from simple to luxurious, with specific movements, camera work, and atmosphere for each 1-second segment.

video:video.video:title: Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, designed to create a Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy film. The prompt specifies style, resolution (8K), rendering engine (Unreal Engine 5), duration (15 seconds), and three distinct camera/action sequences involving a model in liquid blue-and-white porcelain that shatters into ink-wash swallows, culminating in a 3D fluid ink vortex.

video:video.video:title: Sci-Fi Cinematic Scene: AI Captain vs. Human Astronaut
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a hyperrealistic, cinematic video scene depicting a massive mothership traveling through a wormhole. The scene focuses on a dramatic confrontation between an AI captain and a human astronaut on the bridge, with the wormhole tearing the ship apart in the background.

video:video.video:title: Dunhuang Mural Apsara Goddess Comes to Life
video:video.video:description: A single prompt to transform a 2D Dunhuang mural painting into a living, breathing 3D video. The prompt specifies an apsara goddess peeling off a cave wall, flowing silk ribbons with real physics, and Buddhist chanting echoing through the cave.

video:video.video:title: Fashion Editorial Video with Consistent Curvy Model
video:video.video:description: A prompt for creating a fashion editorial video using an uploaded image of a model. It emphasizes character consistency, describes the model as a curvy hourglass figure, and specifies various sensual poses, camera angles (close-up, body zoom, face shot, walk), and a multi-angle shot approach.

video:video.video:title: Single-Take Tracking Shot from Past to Present
video:video.video:description: A prompt inspired by the film 'Wings' (1927) to generate a single-take tracking shot that transitions the scene from the past to the present.

video:video.video:title: Complex Multi-Scene Narrative: Santa and the Entitled Woman
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt demonstrating Seedance 2.0's ability to handle complex narrative structures, character references, and integrated audio files (speech1 and speech2). The scene involves a soot-covered Santa working on a metallic sleigh outside a Victorian mansion, interrupted by an entitled blonde woman demanding money, leading to a dramatic exchange.

video:video.video:title: Gothic Mystery Scene: Woman Descends Staircase
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for a live-action scene involving a woman descending a staircase, a camera tilt, a portrait reveal, a gasp, and dramatic environmental effects (thunder, blowing out candles) to create a mysterious and suspenseful atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Tech Billionaire CEO Smoking Meats
video:video.video:description: A prompt describing a tech billionaire CEO live-streaming himself smoking various meats with friends in his backyard.

video:video.video:title: Man at a Bar with Moon Landing on TV
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for generating a short video sequence featuring a man sitting at a bar, focusing on cuts between the man, a TV showing the 1969 moon landing, and a sudden, shocking event involving a cow's head falling from the wall.

video:video.video:title: Drone shot of a skiing rabbit escaping an avalanche
video:video.video:description: A cinematic prompt for a drone shot featuring a rabbit desperately skiing down a snowy slope while being chased by a massive, thundering avalanche.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic avalanche scene prompt for Kling 3.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt designed for Kling 3.0, describing an ultra-wide aerial shot that dives towards a train, followed by an avalanche, and ends with the camera rapidly climbing as the train enters a tunnel.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Chinese Xianxia animation prompt (0-15 seconds)
video:video.video:description: A detailed Chinese prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating the first 15 seconds of a high-energy, cinematic 3D Xianxia (immortal hero) animation. It specifies the aspect ratio, style, color palette, and camera movement, focusing on a male cultivator standing on a cliff edge facing an approaching demonic energy.

video:video.video:title: POV E-Girl Video Prompt: Flirty Asian Woman in White Shirt by Window
video:video.video:description: A detailed video prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 'virtual girlfriend' scene from a first-person perspective (POV). The scene features a young, beautiful Asian woman sitting by a high-rise window, wearing an oversized white shirt, and engaging in a flirty, intimate dialogue with the camera, emphasizing natural light, film grain, and an ambiguous, suggestive atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Dance Video Generation Prompt using Image and Video References
video:video.video:description: This is a detailed prompt for generating a dance video using Seedance 2.0. It specifies using a female character from a reference image as the subject and referencing a separate video for both the camera movement (rhythmic push, pull, pan, tilt) and the energetic choreography.

video:video.video:title: Shaky POV Vlog Prompt: Innocent and Seductive Girl on Wet Street
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a shaky, low-quality smartphone vlog footage video. The scene features a beautiful girl with a seductive yet innocent aura walking on a wet street at night, with neon reflections, high ISO noise, and dynamic motion blur, culminating in a close-up, playful interaction with the camera.

video:video.video:title: Flower Goddess Descent Cinematic Prompt (Epic Fantasy)
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-scene cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an epic fantasy video of an Eastern Flower Goddess descending. The prompt specifies character design (ethereal, cold beauty, divine aura, elaborate gown with flowing ribbons and light effects), scene setting (giant flower pistil throne, divine light), visual quality (8K, extreme detail, dynamic camera work), and a seven-step sequence of divine actions and cosmic effects (flower blooming, light streams, creation dance, explosion of petals).

video:video.video:title: Lin Daiyu Pulling Out a Willow Tree (Contrasting Comedy)
video:video.video:description: A cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a humorous, high-contrast video. It features the famously delicate Chinese beauty Lin Daiyu (from Dream of the Red Chamber) initially appearing frail and tearful, only to suddenly display superhuman strength by uprooting a massive willow tree, emphasizing the dramatic contrast, slow motion, and realistic textures.

video:video.video:title: Cyberpunk Android Skin Generation Sequence Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video sequence showing a female figure transforming from a cyberpunk mechanical skeleton into a fully formed human body. The focus is on the gradual generation of skin, tissue, and clothing, starting from the chest and moving outwards, set against a cyberpunk background with appropriate music.

video:video.video:title: 2D Anime Video Prompt: White-Haired Girl Summons Water Dragon
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 2D anime video in the Guofeng (Chinese style) and Xuanji Technology art style. The scene features a cold, elegant white-haired girl in a dark blue robe, who, after a provocative line of dialogue, dramatically summons a water dragon amidst a sudden storm, emphasizing detailed texture, low saturation, and high contrast.

video:video.video:title: KTV Girlfriend POV Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a realistic, vertical video from a first-person boyfriend perspective set in a dimly lit KTV room, focusing on a beautiful Asian woman's interaction and actions.

video:video.video:title: Lord of the Rings Style Epic Fantasy Masterpiece Prompt
video:video.video:description: This is the first of five epic fantasy adventure prompts designed for Seedance 2.0, aiming to generate a cinematic, Lord of the Rings-style video. The prompt describes a battle scene where a young mage summons a phoenix to fight a dark lord's army in an ancient elven forest, featuring magical effects and a dynamic camera movement.

video:video.video:title: Need for Speed Style Drifting Video Prompt (Two Segments)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, two-segment prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a 'Need for Speed' style car drifting video. The prompt specifies a first-person cockpit view, night neon racetrack setting, high contrast, strong motion blur, and narrative elements like engine sounds, high-speed driving, perfect drifting maneuvers, and a chase sequence.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Transform Prompt Framework
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot Japanese prompt framework for Seedance 2.0, designed to create a stable 'transform' sequence where a character is built from silver liquid metal into a human-looking figure with mechanical elements, culminating in a final appearance and dialogue. This framework is shared after extensive testing to reproduce common transformation videos.

video:video.video:title: Giant cartoon girl vlog at an amusement park
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to create a vlog featuring a giant cartoon girl at a seaside amusement park, using two reference images for the character and the location.

video:video.video:title: Goblin traveller and steed in the mountains
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic video of a goblin traveller and his mountain boar steed crossing a snow-covered ridge.

video:video.video:title: Low-effort UGC video for skincare brand
video:video.video:description: A simple, low-effort prompt used to generate a UGC (User Generated Content) video for a skincare brand, demonstrating Seedance 2.0's ability to create realistic commercial content.

video:video.video:title: Capybara salaryman day in the life
video:video.video:description: A prompt to generate a highly realistic video depicting the 'day in the life' of a salaryman, but the salaryman is a capybara.

video:video.video:title: Action adventure/sci-fi scene with a soldier
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-step prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an action-adventure/sci-fi scene featuring a soldier entering a mysterious jungle area called 'latent space' and discovering a colossal obsidian object, all set to a cinematic soundtrack.

video:video.video:title: Giant mechanical robot transformation from airplane
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a hyper-realistic, cinematic video of a wide-body passenger jet transforming into a colossal metal robot upon landing, all filmed from a vertical smartphone perspective with authentic live-recording aesthetics.

video:video.video:title: Synchronized TikTok Dance to Fight Chaos
video:video.video:description: A detailed narrative prompt describing a sequence of events for a video: four girls performing a synchronized TikTok dance, which glitches and transitions into a slow-motion fight scene, ending with them laughing on the ground.

video:video.video:title: Red Dawn: Urban Mutation in Chaos
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a cinematic scene titled 'Red Dawn: The Rebirth of the City in Chaos in the Northern Dynasty.' The scene depicts a sudden urban mutation that disrupts the morning order, leading to confusion, panic, and people searching for direction amidst unruly crowds and unknown phenomena.

video:video.video:title: Dynamic Cinematic Hip-Hop Dance Video
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a highly dynamic, cinematic dance video based on a reference image. The video should feature flawless modern hip-hop choreography, rapid rhythmic camera cuts, dynamic B-rolls (close-ups of sneakers, facial expressions, hand isolations), extreme low-angle tracking shots, dynamic panning, slight shaky-cam effects, cinematic studio lighting, motion blur, and hyper-detailed photorealism, trending on social media.

video:video.video:title: Massive Explosion at Downtown Road Junction
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a wide shot of two cars colliding at a downtown road junction in a major US city, resulting in a massive explosion.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Rocket Launch Action Sequence
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating an intense cinematic action sequence where a landscaper runs through a forest into a clearing, enters a waiting rocket, and the rocket launches.

video:video.video:title: The Pianist and the Ruins (Time Reversal)
video:video.video:description: A prompt for a 40-second video titled 'The Pianist and the Ruins,' depicting a pianist playing in a bombed cathedral while time reverses: walls rebuild, stained glass reassembles, and ghostly listeners fill the pews.

video:video.video:title: Bruce Lee vs. Jackie Chan Looping Action
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a looping action sequence featuring Bruce Lee fighting Jackie Chan in the style of old Japanese television movies, ensuring the video start loops seamlessly with the end.

video:video.video:title: Alien Screams and T-Rex Roar
video:video.video:description: A humorous prompt for a 5-second video where an alien screams 'hasta la vista' while a T-Rex is running, followed by the T-Rex stopping and roaring.

video:video.video:title: Taipei Street Scene with Sudden Event
video:video.video:description: A detailed video prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a bustling, humid Taipei street scene, focusing on the movement of traffic and a sudden upward tilt of a trembling phone camera, triggered by voices shouting to look up.

video:video.video:title: Alpine Inn Daily Chores Scene
video:video.video:description: A multi-shot video prompt detailing various activities around an Alpine inn, including a flag waving, a man repairing shoes, a woman sorting apples, and a baker working, designed to add personal touches and additional shots to a scene.

video:video.video:title: Ethereal Wanderer in Fog-Shrouded Forest
video:video.video:description: A cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 setting an ancient, fog-shrouded forest scene at midnight, where an ethereal figure in flowing robes dashes between gnarled trees under a fractured moon, with the camera seamlessly gliding through the haze.

video:video.video:title: Cryo-Lab Diagnostic Scene
video:video.video:description: A video prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing the opening shot of a sterile cryo-lab scene. It describes a wide overhead view of a human-looking woman lying in a transparent diagnostic pod, with subtle breathing and blue scan lines sweeping over her body.

video:video.video:title: Sora Test Failure Example
video:video.video:description: An example prompt used to test Sora's capabilities, demonstrating a failure in generating a man counting out loud from 1 to 10 using his fingers.

video:video.video:title: Abstract Painter Transformation Sequence
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt describing an artist painting intensely, culminating in her hurling paint at the canvas, which then transforms into a photorealistic mountain landscape, ending with a quick shot of a cat.

video:video.video:title: Snowy Eastern European Thriller Trailer
video:video.video:description: A simple prompt requesting a 15-second trailer for a thriller movie set in snowy Eastern Europe, featuring a montage of a detective, a love story, and a fast-paced investigation.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Short Video Prompt Formula Example
video:video.video:description: An example prompt demonstrating the universal formula for creating short character videos using Seedance 2.0. The prompt describes a high-value, youthful girl in a bedroom setting, wearing a winter off-shoulder outfit, with a high ponytail and specific makeup, captured in a low-quality, high-grain, snapshot style reminiscent of an iPhone photo with a Y2K filter.

video:video.video:title: Horror Scenario in a Parking Lot - Surveillance Footage Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a horror-themed video simulating fixed-camera surveillance footage in a parking lot, focusing on a woman repeatedly failing facial recognition access and her escalating frustration/fear. It uses two reference images for context.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Rain Night 'White Moonlight' Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a cinematic, film grain video of a beautiful, pure yet seductive girl walking on a wet street at night, featuring specific camera movements, lighting, and aesthetic details.

video:video.video:title: Campus Short Drama Video Prompt: 'Belong to Me'
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a short, romantic, cinematic video set in a beautiful study room, featuring a dialogue between a girl and a boy about their zodiac signs, ending humorously.

video:video.video:title: 3D Anime Aesthetic Dance Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 3D anime style dance video featuring a female character with specific appearance, costume, and a highly atmospheric scene set in a dense peach blossom forest.

video:video.video:title: Sora 2 Professional Mythological Fantasy Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A professional prompt designed for Sora 2, focusing on generating a visually stunning, original mythological fantasy battle scene between two fictional immortals in a cosmic setting.

video:video.video:title: POV Flirting with AI-Generated Girlfriend Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, realistic photography prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a POV video interaction with a young Asian woman who breaks the fourth wall and acknowledges she is an AI creation.

video:video.video:title: AI Girlfriend Interaction Scene: Feeding Potato Chips
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt designed to generate a short, stable video scene depicting a cozy, everyday interaction between a couple at home, specifically the girlfriend feeding the boyfriend potato chips, viewed from the boyfriend's first-person perspective. The prompt includes specific character references, style requirements, scene setting, and a five-step, strictly timed dialogue and action sequence to ensure narrative stability and emotional nuance.

video:video.video:title: Coser Resting on Tatami After Party
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a first-person perspective video of a young cosplayer resting comfortably on a tatami mat after a party, holding a selfie camera, with a slightly flushed, satisfied smile, inviting the viewer closer.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Superhero Confrontation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A complex cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing a high-contrast, epic confrontation between a giant, muscular hero in red/black armor and a small, agile hero in red/blue spider-web suit, focusing on intense energy clashes, 35mm film look, and dynamic camera work.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Urban Short Drama Script Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed script prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an urban short drama video featuring a powerful female protagonist, a wealthy antagonist, and a dramatic confrontation involving a broken engagement and a financial reveal.

video:video.video:title: Billboard Image Transformation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt used with Seedance 2.0 to transform an existing screenshot into a scene where the image is displayed on a huge billboard, with surrounding people reacting in awe.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic sci-fi battle scene with a cyborg
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed image-to-video (i2v) prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a dynamic, neon-lit sci-fi battle between a cyborg and a monstrous creature. The prompt specifies professional camera techniques, intense color grading (teal-orange), volumetric effects, and kinetic camera movements to achieve a blockbuster cinematic quality.

video:video.video:title: High-end car commercial concept: Transformation and Vertical Takeoff
video:video.video:description: An extremely detailed, multi-shot storyboard prompt for a 15-second Hollywood blockbuster-style car commercial. The concept transitions from a congested road dilemma to a mechanical transformation and finally a vertical takeoff in a Cyberpunk city setting, emphasizing 8K ultra-clear quality and Transformers-level mechanical detail.

video:video.video:title: FPV cinematic flight through a treehouse
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a fast-paced First-Person View (FPV) cinematic video flying through a hyper-realistic, cozy treehouse environment during golden hour, emphasizing dramatic camera motion.

video:video.video:title: Multi-Shot Anime Fight Choreography Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for consistency across different AI video models (Sora 2, Kling AI, Seedance) that choreographs an anime martial arts fight between two characters, specifying camera angles, timing, movement styles, and sound effects.

video:video.video:title: War Smoke Character Description Prompt
video:video.video:description: A short, atmospheric prompt describing a character named '逐玉' (Zhu Yu) standing in the smoke of war, emphasizing her fierce eyes, stained hands, and eternal heart.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Test: Celestial Invasion
video:video.video:description: A detailed text prompt used for testing Seedance 2.0, describing a dramatic science fiction scene involving an alien invasion where the sky is torn apart and humanity attempts a feeble counterattack against a descending fleet.

video:video.video:title: Multi-shot prompt for a devil character using Kling 3.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for character consistency using Kling 3.0's Omni mode, focusing on the devil character's expressions and actions, including close-ups and a final silhouette shot in hell.

video:video.video:title: Surreal Battlefield Ronin Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed descriptive prompt for generating a surreal fantasy scene featuring a masked ronin battling a colossal winged beast on floating rock islands during a thunderstorm.

video:video.video:title: Witcher vs Resident Evil/Heisenberg prompt concept
video:video.video:description: A conceptual prompt setting up a crossover scenario where The Witcher hunts characters from Resident Evil (Leon and Karl Heisenberg), created using Seedance 2.0.

video:video.video:title: Wholesome Statue of Liberty family chat prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt describing a wholesome yet annoying conversation between the Statue of Liberty and her similarly looking mother about finally getting a grandchild.

video:video.video:title: POV AI Girlfriend Interaction Prompt
video:video.video:description: A user created an interesting interactive video using Seedance 2.0, where a photo of a person comes to life as a flirtatious AI girlfriend. The prompt focuses on a first-person perspective (POV) with sensory details and dialogue.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Yoga Pose Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic, first-person view video of a woman frozen mid-yoga pose, focusing on close-up details of the body and skin texture.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Car Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, realistic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a vertical video from a driver's perspective inside a car at night, featuring an elegant Asian woman in the passenger seat who turns to the camera and slowly removes a high-heeled shoe.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Bedroom Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A Seedance 2.0 prompt describing a bedroom scene featuring a youthful girl wearing a white gauze skirt and red cotton T-shirt, focusing on her bare, slender legs and small white soft leather shoes.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 KTV Scene Prompt (Boyfriend POV)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, realistic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a vertical video from a boyfriend's perspective in a dimly lit KTV room, featuring a beautiful Asian woman who turns to the camera, speaks, and removes a high-heeled shoe.

video:video.video:title: Realistic KTV Scene with Girlfriend POV and Shoe Removal
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a realistic, vertical video from a boyfriend's first-person perspective (POV) set in a dimly lit KTV room. The scene features a beautiful young Asian woman interacting with the camera and slowly removing a high-heeled shoe, focusing on realistic lighting and texture details.

video:video.video:title: Storyboard Prompt for Vintage Art Studio Scene
video:video.video:description: A prompt structured like a storyboard, detailing a single shot (Shot 1) for a video. It describes a warm, yellow-toned vintage art studio with sunlight streaming in, where the camera slowly pushes in on a framed classical portrait painting, accompanied by cheerful classical string music.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Ancient Chinese Mythology Epic Scene
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing the first segment of an epic video in 16:9 aspect ratio, featuring the style of ancient Chinese mythology. The scene is a vast, primeval land under a sky filled with massive cracks, dark void spreading, thunder, lightning, and trembling mountains, viewed from a low angle to emphasize the oppressive feeling of the broken firmament.

video:video.video:title: AI Girlfriend POV Interaction Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a first-person perspective (POV) interaction with an 'AI girlfriend.' The scene involves her playfully pushing the camera away, then leaning in close with an intimate, teasing dialogue, emphasizing subtle sounds and an ambiguous, quiet atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Columbus Navigation Advertisement Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a humorous adventure-themed advertisement video featuring Christopher Columbus using a GPS navigator to find the New World, complete with dialogue and special effects.

video:video.video:title: Modern Beauty to Ancient Warrior Transformation Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 that describes a character transformation sequence: a modern Chinese beauty in a white dress transforms into an ancient female general wearing golden armor and wielding a Green Dragon Crescent Blade, set against a stormy battlefield.

video:video.video:title: Japanese SWAT Team Hostage Scenario Cinematic Script
video:video.video:description: A multi-shot cinematic script prompt for Seedance 2.0, detailing a hostage situation involving the Japanese Special Assault Team (SAT). The script specifies camera angles, character dialogue, lighting, and sound effects across four distinct shots, from a low-angle tactical advance to the aftermath of the resolution.

video:video.video:title: Japanese Boy Transforms into Samurai Guardian Hero
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a young Japanese boy touching a sacred relic in an ancient temple at night, leading to a dramatic transformation into a guardian hero with samurai-inspired armor and a spiritual aura. The prompt emphasizes cinematic lighting, high detail, and dynamic camera movement, resulting in an epic transformation sequence.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Alito Vandalito
video:video.video:description: A Spanish-language prompt for Seedance 2.0, likely used to generate a music video or animated clip featuring the phrase 'alito vandalito' and 'la cadena del baby'. The tweet includes a generated video, indicating this is the input text used for the AI video generation tool.

video:video.video:title: Cyberpunk Hacker in Rain Night Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed multi-segment prompt for generating a cinematic video sequence featuring a hacker in a cyberpunk night market setting. The prompt specifies scene progression, camera movements, lighting (pink/blue neon), sound design (rain, drone hum), and stylistic constraints like anamorphic look, grain, and stable exposure, designed for Seedance 2.0.

video:video.video:title: FPV Cinematic Flight Through a Hyper-Realistic Treehouse
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a dynamic, fast-paced FPV (First-Person View) cinematic video. The scene features a hyper-realistic treehouse setting during golden hour, emphasizing architectural elements like bridges and staircases, warm interior lighting, and a dramatic exit through a skylight.

video:video.video:title: Multi-Camera Opening Scene for Eyes Wide Shut 2
video:video.video:description: A complex, multi-shot prompt designed to generate a 15-second opening scene for a fictional sequel to 'Eyes Wide Shut.' It requires using a reference image for style and specifies a sequence of shots: a wide exterior, guests entering, a couple dancing in a ballroom, and a bartender shaking drinks, all edited with a fast-paced, music-video style.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Temple Mandala Descent
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a cinematic video focusing on an ancient stone mandala. The camera slowly descends, capturing the mystical atmosphere created by volumetric lighting, golden dust, deep shadows, and the glowing, ultra-detailed symmetrical carvings.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Short Film with Red Laser Scan
video:video.video:description: A prompt for creating a cinematic short film featuring multiple shots of a woman with specific styling (short silver hair, black turtleneck) against a concrete wall, highlighted by a dramatic effect where a horizontal red laser light scans across her eyes.

video:video.video:title: Futuristic Promotional Video for KIRI Engine
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive, multi-stage prompt for generating a futuristic, high-tech promotional video for the KIRI Engine mobile 3D scanning app. The video sequence includes scanning a real object, the object transforming into a glowing 3D Gaussian Splatting model, and transitions into various creative workflows (game world, 3D software, virtual exhibition), concluding with a logo and tagline.

video:video.video:title: Dark Underground Forge-Cavern Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed text prompt for generating a video using Seedance 2.0, describing a dark, industrial, underground forge-cavern scene with molten metal rivers, black obsidian walls, hanging industrial chains, and hissing steam.

video:video.video:title: Antarctic Leviathan Awakening
video:video.video:description: A prompt describing the dramatic awakening of a prehistoric kaiju (leviathan) from melting ice in the Antarctic, emphasizing fluid physics and cinematic lighting for a 15-second video.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 K-pop Dance Video Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a K-pop dance video based on an uploaded reference photo. The prompt specifies the subject's appearance, clothing, actions, scene, camera work, and desired video quality, following a standard formula: Subject + Action + Scene + Camera Work + Style/Quality + Constraints.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Car Commercial Script Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene script prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic car commercial (TVC style) purely from text-to-video, without any reference images or products. The script outlines six distinct scenes, camera movements, and a voiceover.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 KTV Scene Prompt
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt designed to generate a video clip of a beautiful Asian woman in a dimly lit, ambiguous KTV room, focusing on lighting, atmosphere, character movement, and camera work, culminating in a close-up of her removing a high-heeled shoe.

video:video.video:title: Mecha Style Text Animation Prompt for Seedance 2.0
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-stage prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video animation of the Chinese characters '霸王甲' (Overlord Armor) in a heavy mecha style. The prompt specifies the scene, sound effects, lighting, camera work, and the sequential formation of each character, emphasizing a sense of power and mechanical transformation.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Ming Dynasty Painting Revival Prompt
video:video.video:description: A description of a video generated by Seedance 2.0, which uses AI technology to bring the Ming Dynasty painting 'Hundred Beauties' by Qiu Ying to life, accurately replicating the heavy color and mineral pigment texture of traditional Gongbi painting, dynamically restoring scenes of court ladies enjoying spring.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Font Video Generation Prompt (Sword Style)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-stage Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a video title sequence featuring the characters '拿幸' (Na Xing) in a sharp, ink-splatter, sword-like style, emphasizing dynamic particle effects, color grading (cyan-white), and a fixed camera perspective.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Qing Dynasty Painting Revival Prompt
video:video.video:description: A description of a video generated by Seedance 2.0, which uses AI technology to dynamically revive the Qing Dynasty court Gongbi painting 'Red Rain in Donglin,' capturing the spirit of the brushwork and the innocence of children playing in a jujube forest during mid-autumn.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: White Crop Top Dance
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 10-second, high-definition, cinematic video of a woman performing a chair dance. The prompt specifies the subject's appearance (brown curly hair with pink highlights, white crop top, black leather shorts, black combat boots), the setting (stage background with color-changing circular lights, reflective floor), camera work (cinematic movement and cuts), lighting (soft side light, strong contrast), and audio (electronic music with heavy beats, no dialogue/subtitles).

video:video.video:title: Futuristic Sci-Fi Action Scene
video:video.video:description: A prompt for generating a cinematic sci-fi action video featuring a yellow electric creature fighting alien troops on a futuristic battlefield, emphasizing dramatic lighting.

video:video.video:title: Chaotic Food Fight Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for generating a chaotic food fight scene using Seedance 2.0, specifying cinematic shots, dramatic slow motion, and vivid splattering details for a high-energy video output.

video:video.video:title: Persian Baddies Liberation Scene (Humorous)
video:video.video:description: A humorous and highly specific prompt requesting a scene showing support for 'beautiful Persian baddies' and asking for their contact information, likely resulting in a comedic or stylized video.

video:video.video:title: Wuxia Hero Cat Battle Scene
video:video.video:description: A creative prompt for generating a Wuxia-style action scene featuring a hero cat battling assassins on a drifting bamboo raft amidst mist and waterfalls.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic 1950s Film Noir Diner Scene
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt designed for video generation (likely comparing Kling 3.0 and Seedance 2.0) describing a high-contrast, black and white 1950s film noir scene in a diner, focusing on character interaction, lighting, and film aesthetics.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Fight Scene Generation in Guoman Style (Seedance 2.0)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-energy, cinematic fight video in the style of the Chinese animation 'Fog Hill of Five Elements' (Wushan Wuxing). The prompt specifies camera work, action choreography, visual style, and emotional intensity across five distinct shots, focusing on a fierce battle between two equally matched martial artists.

video:video.video:title: Mechanical Parts, Laser Swords, Monsters, and Martial Arts
video:video.video:description: The user is testing the capabilities of Seedance 2.0 by generating clips featuring mechanical parts, laser swords, monsters, and martial arts, which were then edited together into a video.

video:video.video:title: Guoman Goddess Skateboard Video Generation (Seedance 2.0)
video:video.video:description: A highly detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a dynamic video of a Guoman (Chinese animation) style goddess skateboarding. The prompt specifies camera angles (third-person follow, ultra-wide angle), motion dynamics (tilting, speed changes, turbulence), visual effects (dynamic blur, speed lines, film grain), and high-contrast color schemes across different segments of the ride.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic CG Short Film of Guoman Character Duel (Seedance 2.0)
video:video.video:description: A detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second cinematic CG short film depicting a duel between two Guoman (Chinese animation) characters in a snowy, ruined martial arts arena. The prompt uses placeholders for two reference images and specifies action choreography, camera work, and the final dramatic standoff.

video:video.video:title: Anime Style Street Encounter Transition Video (Seedance 2.0)
video:video.video:description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a first-person, anime-style video clip of a chance encounter on a busy street. The scene involves bumping into a girl, her turning around, and a brief dialogue, with specific details on character appearance, setting, lighting, and a musical cue for the transition.

video:video.video:title: Universal Cinematic Video Script/Prompt Framework
video:video.video:description: A universal framework (script/prompt) for generating 15-second promotional videos, following a four-part structure: setting the atmosphere (slow), building tension (slow to fast), montage of visual anchors (fast cuts), and a slow, narrative conclusion with text overlay. The example script is for a promotional video about the city of Chengdu.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Travel Vlog Montage with Seamless Transitions
video:video.video:description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to create a travel vlog montage featuring a girl taking selfies. The prompt emphasizes a handheld, authentic travel feel, bright cinematic colors, and seamless transitions achieved through continuous action and object occlusion (like covering the lens with a hand or object). It describes four distinct scenes with specific lighting, attire, and camera effects.

video:video.video:title: Seedance 2.0 video prompt for an AI girlfriend scenario
video:video.video:description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt designed to generate a realistic, high-definition video of a young Asian woman in a POV style, creating an intimate 'AI girlfriend' atmosphere.

video:video.video:title: Cinematic Epic Battle Prompt: Beauty vs. Monster
video:video.video:description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-quality 4K video of a beautiful, cold female swordswoman fighting a massive rock monster. The prompt specifies character details, actions (defense, leap), scene setting (dark ruins, lava, strong light effects), and complex camera movements like Dolly Zoom and Crane Up to achieve an epic, dark, and sharp film quality.
